technology.title: I-VirtualMD.app's Advanced Health AI Technology
technology.description1: I-VirtualMD.app isebenzisa ama-algorithms amasha athuthukiswe ithimba lethu lodokotela abaqeqeshwe e-Harvard nochwepheshe be-AI ukuze balethe ulwazi lwezempilo olunembe ngendlela emangalisayo. Abantu bethu abangochwepheshe bezempilo be-AI baqeqeshwe ezincwadini eziningi zezempilo, izinkombandlela zemitholampilo, nezimo zezempilo zomhlaba wangempela ukuze banikeze imininingwane efana neyochwepheshe abagunyazwe yibhodi.
technology.description2: Ekuqhathaniseni okulawulwayo okuhlangene ukuze kube nokunemba kokuxilonga, isistimu yethu ibonise ukusebenza okumangalisayo, ngokuvamile ukufanisa noma ukweqa imininingwane yodokotela abanolwazi. Abantu bethu be-AI bangacubungula izinkulungwane zamaphepha ocwaningo lwezempilo, imihlahlandlela, kanye nezinqubo zomtholampilo ngemizuzwana—ukuthola ulwazi olungaphezu kwalokho uchwepheshe oyedwa wezempilo ongalugcina.
technology.description3: Nakuba silwela ukunemba okukhethekile futhi nethimba lethu liqhubeka lithuthukisa uhlelo, imithi iyinkimbinkimbi futhi izimo zempilo ngazinye zihlukile. Kungakho siklame inkundla yethu ukuthi yengeze—hhayi esikhundleni—ubuchwepheshe obuyigugu babahlinzeki bezempilo abangabantu.

disclaimer.title: Sebenzisa Ngobungozi Bakho
disclaimer.description: Ulwazi olunikezwe i-VirtualMD.app kanye nabantu bayo abangochwepheshe bezempilo be-AI okwezinjongo zolwazi nezemfundo kuphela. Ngokusebenzisa le sevisi, uyavuma futhi uyavuma ukuthi:

points.mayContainErrors: Okuqukethwe okukhiqizwa yi-AI kungase kuqukathe amaphutha noma okukhishiwe naphezu kwezinqubo zethu zokuqinisekisa eziqinile
points.requiresEvaluation: Iseluleko sezokwelapha sidinga ukuhlolwa komuntu siqu ngabahlinzeki bezempilo abanelayisensi
points.mayBeOutdated: Ulwazi lwezempilo lungase luphelelwe isikhathi njengoba ulwazi lwezokwelapha lukhula
points.uniqueCircumstances: Umlando wakho wezokwelapha oyingqayizivele, izimo, nezimo zidinga ukuhlolwa kochwepheshe

disclaimer.userResponsibility: Nakuba i-VirtualMD.app isebenzisa ubuchwepheshe obuyindida ukuze ilethe imininingwane yezokwelapha ebalulekile, abasebenzisi bathatha wonke umthwalo wemfanelo wokuthi balusebenzisa kanjani lolu lwazi.
disclaimer.missionStatement: Ithimba le-VirtualMD.app lenze lobu buchwepheshe ngoba sikholelwa ekwenzeni intando yeningi ukufinyelela olwazini lwezokwelapha olusezingeni lomhlaba kanye nokusekela izinqumo ezingcono zezempilo. Isistimu yethu ye-AI imele intuthuko ethuthukayo kubuchwepheshe bolwazi lwezempilo okuthi, uma lusetshenziswa kahle eduze nokunakekelwa kochwepheshe, lungakusiza wenze izinqumo zezempilo unolwazi futhi ube nezingxoxo ezikhiqizayo nabahlinzeki bakho bezempilo. Ukungasebenzisi ubuchwepheshe obuphambili obunjalo lapho butholakala kungaba ithuba lokuthola ulwazi lwezokwelapha olungase lushintshe ukuphila.

aboutEncyclopediaPage.title: I-VirtualMD.app Encyclopedia of Health and Wellness
aboutEncyclopediaPage.p1: Ezweni lanamuhla ledijithali, inqwaba yolwazi lwezempilo isesandleni sethu, kodwa ukuhlukanisa iseluleko esithembekile nolwazi olunganembile kungaba yinto emangalisayo.
aboutEncyclopediaPage.p2: IVirtualMD.app Encyclopedia inqamula umsindo, ikunikeza indlela eguquguqukayo yokuzibandakanya nempilo yakho. Ihlanganiswe ngokukhethekile neplatifomu yethu, ikuvumela ukuthi ufinyelele imininingwane ejulile, ekhonjiwe evela kumajenali ezokwelapha ahlonishwayo ngaphandle kokushiya ukubonisana kwakho bukhoma nethimba lethu lochwepheshe be-AI.
aboutEncyclopediaPage.p3: Lena akuyona nje injini yokusesha; kuyisici esiqeqeshwe ngokukhethekile "socwaningo olujulile" esiklanyelwe ukuba yinsiza yakho ethembekile phakathi nengxoxo.
aboutEncyclopediaPage.p4: Zicabange usengxoxweni nodokotela wethu wenhliziyo we-AI kanye nesazi sezokudla sixoxa ngokuphathwa kwe-cholesterol. Igama elithi "statins" liyashiwo, futhi ufuna ukuqonda okungaphezu nje kwezisekelo. Esikhundleni sokumisa ingxoxo yakho ukuze useshe i-inthanethi evulekile, ungakwazi ukufinyelela ngokushesha i-VirtualMD.app Encyclopedia. Izohlinzeka ngesifinyezo esibanzi, kodwa esiqondakala kalula sokuthi ama-statin asebenza kanjani, izinzuzo zawo, kanye nemiphumela engemihle engaba khona, nalo lonke ulwazi olutholakala ezincwadini ezibuyekezwe ngontanga njenge-Lancet noma i-New England Journal of Medicine.

section2.title: Ulwazi Esiluqoqayo Neminye Imininingwane Yobumfihlo
section2.content:
Ulwazi Esiluqoqayo
   Siqoqa ulwazi osinikeza lona ngokuqondile, ulwazi esiluqoqa ngokuzenzakalelayo ngokusebenzisa kwakho Isevisi, kanye nolwazi oluvela emithonjeni yezinkampani zangaphandle.

Ulwazi Lwe-akhawunti: Uma ubhalisa, siqoqa ulwazi olufana negama lakho, ikheli le-imeyili, nenombolo yocingo (ngezinjongo zokuqinisekisa).
Okuqukethwe komsebenzisi: Siqoqa ulwazi olunikezayo lapho usebenzisa Isevisi, okuhlanganisa umbhalo ofakwe ku-interface yengxoxo, ulwazi lwephrofayela (njengohlu lwemithi, uma lunikeziwe), kanye nempendulo.
Ulwazi Lokusetshenziswa: Siqoqa ngokuzenzakalela ulwazi mayelana nokusebenzisana kwakho Nesevisi, njengekheli le-IP, uhlobo lwesiphequluli, ulwazi lwedivayisi, isistimu yokusebenza, amakhasi abukiwe, izixhumanisi ezichofoziwe, kanye nezinsuku nezikhathi zokuvakasha kwakho.
Amakhukhi kanye Nobuchwepheshe Obufanayo: Sisebenzisa amakhukhi kanye nobuchwepheshe bokulandelela okufanayo ukuze silandelele umsebenzi Kusevisi yethu futhi sibambe ulwazi oluthile. Ungayalela isiphequluli sakho ukuthi senqabe wonke amakhukhi noma sibonise lapho kuthunyelwa ikhukhi. Nokho, uma ungawamukeli amakhukhi, ungase ungakwazi ukusebenzisa ezinye izingxenye Zesevisi yethu.

Indlela Esisebenzisa Ngayo Ulwazi
Sisebenzisa ulwazi esiluqoqayo ngezinjongo ezihlukahlukene, ezihlanganisa:

Hlinzeka, sebenzisa, nakekela, futhi uthuthukise Isevisi.
Cubungula okwenziwayo futhi uthumele ulwazi oluhlobene, okuhlanganisa iziqinisekiso nama-invoyisi (uma kusebenza).
Thumela izaziso zobuchwepheshe, izibuyekezo, izexwayiso zokuphepha, kanye nemilayezo yosekelo neyokuphatha.
Phendula kumazwana akho, imibuzo, nezicelo futhi unikeze isevisi yamakhasimende.
Xhumana nawe mayelana nemikhiqizo, amasevisi, okunikezwayo, amaphromoshini, imiklomelo, nemicimbi ehlinzekwa yi-VirtualMD nabanye, futhi sikunikeze izindaba nolwazi esicabanga ukuthi ungaba nentshisekelo kulo (ngokuya ngamalungelo akho okuphuma).
Gada futhi uhlaziye izitayela, ukusetshenziswa, kanye nemisebenzi ehlobene Nesevisi yethu.
Thola, phenya, futhi uvimbele ukuthengiselana okuwumgunyathi neminye imisebenzi engekho emthethweni futhi uvikele amalungelo nempahla ye-VirtualMD nezinye.
Yenza kube ngokwakho futhi uthuthukise Isevisi futhi unikeze ngokuqukethwe noma izici ezifana namaphrofayela wabasebenzisi noma izinto abazithakaselayo.
Thuthukisa ukunemba, ukusebenza kahle, nokuphepha kwamamodeli wethu we-AI nezici zeplathifomu usebenzisa idatha engaziwa nehlanganisiwe.
Yenza noma iyiphi enye injongo oyichaze ngesikhathi uqoqwa ulwazi.

Indlela Esabelana Ngayo Ulwazi

Izinketho Zakho Zobumfihlo

Uma uphuma, sisengakwazi ukukuthumelela ukuxhumana okungekona okokukhangisa, okufana nalokho okumayelana ne-akhawunti yakho noma ubudlelwano bethu bebhizinisi obuqhubekayo.

Idatha engaziwa nehlanganisiwe esetshenziselwa ukuthuthukiswa kwesistimu ingase igcinwe unomphela.

section5.title: Imikhuba Yokuphepha ye-VirtualMD.app
section5.content:
Sisebenzisa isu lokuvikela elinezendlalelo eziningi:

Ukuqinisekiswa Kwezinto Ezimbili (2FA):
Kuyisibopho kuwo wonke ama-akhawunti, kudinga ukuqinisekiswa ngesici sesibili (isb., ikhodi ku-imeyili/ifoni).

Inketho ye-Three-Factor Authentication (3FA):
Ukuphepha okuthuthukisiwe ongakukhetha okudinga iphasiwedi, ikhodi ye-imeyili, KANYE nekhodi ye-SMS.

Lezi zinyathelo zihlinzeka ngokuvikeleka kwe-akhawunti okuqinile, kodwa khumbula ukuthi ayikho isistimu evikeleke ngo-100%.

section6.title: I-VirtualMD.app & ne-HIPAA Ukucatshangelwa (Ukuphindaphinda)
section6.content:

Abasebenzisi abadinga ukuthotshelwa kwe-HIPAA okuqinile kwe-PHI abayiphethe akufanele basebenzise inkundla yethu evamile ngezinjongo ezinjalo ngaphandle kwe-BAA. Abasebenzisi akumele bafake ulwazi olungalandelelwa esigulini ngasinye esimongweni esiphula i-HIPAA ngaphandle kwemvume ecacile, enolwazi oluvumayo isimo sokuthobelana sengxenyekazi se-HIPAA salokho kusetshenziswa.

section7.title: Ukusetshenziswa Kwedatha Ngabahlinzeki Benjini Yeqembu Le-AI
section7.content:

I-VirtualMD.app:

Silungiselela ukusebenzisa kwethu lezi zinsiza ukuze kuhambisane nalezi zinketho zokulondoloza ubumfihlo. Buyekeza izinqubomgomo zabo ezithile ukuze uthole imininingwane.

Ezinye Izinhlinzeko Zomthetho
Izinguquko Zale Migomo Nenqubomgomo
I-VirtualMD igodla ilungelo, ngokubona kwethu kuphela, ukushintsha noma ukufaka esikhundleni sale Migomo kanye Nenqubomgomo Yobumfihlo ehlanganisiwe nganoma yisiphi isikhathi. Uma isibuyekezo sibalulekile, sizohlinzeka okungenani ngesaziso sezinsuku ezingu-30 ngaphambi kokuba noma yimiphi imigomo emisha iqale ukusebenza, esingase sinikezwe nge-imeyili ekhelini elihambisana ne-akhawunti yakho noma ngokuthumela isaziso Kusevisi.

Ukuthi yini ehlanganisa ushintsho olubonakalayo kuzonqunywa ngokubona kwethu.

Ngokuqhubeka nokufinyelela noma ukusebenzisa Isevisi yethu ngemva kokuthi noma yiziphi izibuyekezo sezisebenza, uyavuma ukuboshezelwa imigomo ebuyekeziwe. Uma ungavumelani nemigomo emisha, awusagunyaziwe ukusebenzisa Isevisi futhi kufanele uyeke ukusebenzisa ngokushesha.

Kuyisibopho sakho ukuhlola le Migomo ngezikhathi ezithile ukuze uthole izinguquko.

Ukunqanyulwa
Unganqamula i-akhawunti yakho futhi uyeke ukusebenzisa Isevisi nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ngokulandela imiyalelo engaphakathi Kwesevisi noma ngokusithinta.

I-VirtualMD, ngokubona kwayo iyodwa, ingamisa noma inqamule ukufinyelela kwakho kuyo yonke noma ingxenye Yesevisi, ngesaziso noma ngaphandle kwanoma yisiphi isizathu, okuhlanganisa, ngaphandle komkhawulo, ukwephulwa kwale Migomo. Izizathu zokunqanyulwa zingabandakanya, kodwa azikhawulelwe, ukungasebenzi isikhathi eside, izicelo zabezomthetho noma ezinye izinhlaka zikahulumeni, ukungaqhubeki noma ukuguqulwa kwezinto ezibonakalayo Kwesevisi, noma izinkinga ezingalindelekile zobuchwepheshe noma zokuphepha.

Ngemva kokunqanyulwa, ilungelo lakho lokusebenzisa Isevisi lizophela ngokushesha. Zonke izinhlinzeko Zemigomo ngokwemvelo yazo okufanele ziqhubeke nokunqanyulwa kuzosinda ekunqanyulweni, okuhlanganisa, ngaphandle komkhawulo, izinhlinzeko zobunikazi, ukuzihlangula kwesiqinisekiso, inkokhelo, kanye nemikhawulo yesikweletu.

Ngeke sibe nesibopho kuwe noma kunoma yimuphi umuntu wesithathu nganoma yikuphi ukunqanyulwa kokufinyelela kwakho Kusevisi.

Umthetho Ophethe kanye Nokuxazululwa Kwezingxabano
Le Migomo kanye nokusebenzisa kwakho Isevisi kuzobuswa futhi kuchazwe ngokuvumelana nemithetho ye-Commonwealth yase-Massachusetts, United States of America, ngaphandle kokubheka ukungqubuzana kwayo kwezimiso zomthetho.

Uyavuma ukuthi noma isiphi isenzo somthetho noma ukuqhubeka okuvela noma okuhlobene nale Migomo noma Isevisi kuzolethwa ngokukhethekile ezinkantolo zikahulumeni noma zombuso ezitholakala e-Suffolk County, Massachusetts, USA. Ngalokhu uvumela igunya elikhethekile kanye nendawo yalezo zinkantolo futhi uyeka noma yikuphi ukuphikisa mayelana nesithangami esiphazamisayo.

I-VirtualMD ingase, ngokubona kwayo yodwa, idinge ukuthi uhambise noma yiziphi izingxabano ezivela ekusetshenzisweni kwale Migomo noma Isevisi, okuhlanganisa izingxabano ezivela noma eziphathelene nokutolikwa kwayo, ukwephulwa, ukungasebenzi, ukungasebenzi, noma ukunqanyulwa, ukuze kuphothulwe futhi kubophe ukulamula ngaphansi Kwemithetho Yokulamula ye-American Arbitration Association esebenzisa umthetho waseMassachusetts.

Ulwazi lokuxhumana
Uma unemibuzo mayelana nale Migomo noma Inqubomgomo Yobumfihlo, sicela usithinte ku-: legal@virtualmd.app noma ngekhasi lethu elithi Xhumana nathi.

Okunhlobonhlobo
Isivumelwano Esiphelele
Le Migomo kanye neNqubomgomo yethu Yobumfihlo ihlanganisa ukuphela kanye nesivumelwano sonke phakathi kwakho ne-VirtualMD Technologies, LLC mayelana Nesevisi futhi ithatha indawo yakho konke ukuqonda, izivumelwano, izethulo, neziqinisekiso, ezibhaliwe noma ezixoxwayo, zangaphambili nezingaleso sikhathi, izivumelwano, izethulo, neziqinisekiso, kokubili ezibhaliwe noma ngomlomo, mayelana Nesevisi.

Ukuhlukaniswa
Uma noma yikuphi ukunikezwa kwale Migomo kubanjwe inkantolo noma enye inkantolo enegunya lokulawula njengengavumelekile, ingekho emthethweni, noma ingaphoqeleleki nganoma yisiphi isizathu, lokho kunikezwa kuzoqedwa noma kukhawulwe ngezinga elincane lokuthi izinhlinzeko ezisele zeMigomo zizoqhubeka nokusebenza ngokugcwele.

Ukuyekelela
Akukho ukuyekwa yi-VirtualMD kwanoma iyiphi itemu noma umbandela obekwe kule Migomo kuzothathwa njengokuyekwa okuqhubekayo noma okuqhubekayo kwalowo mgomo noma isimo noma ukuhoxiswa kwanoma iyiphi enye itemu noma umbandela, futhi noma yikuphi ukwehluleka kwe-VirtualMD ukugomela ilungelo noma ukuhlinzekwa ngaphansi kwale Migomo ngeke kube ukuhoxiswa kwalelo lungelo noma ukuhlinzekwa.

Isabelo
Le Migomo, nanoma imaphi amalungelo namalayisense anikezwe lapha ngezansi, angeke adluliswe noma anikezwe nguwe, kodwa angase anikezwe i-VirtualMD ngaphandle kokuvinjelwa.

Izihloko
Izihloko zesigaba ezisetshenziswe lapha ezenzelwe ukunethezeka kuphela futhi ngeke zinikezwe noma yikuphi ukungeniswa okusemthethweni.

I-force majeure
I-VirtualMD ngeke ibe nesibopho sanoma yikuphi ukwehluleka ukwenza izibopho zayo lapha ngezansi lapho lokho kwehluleka kuvela kunoma iyiphi imbangela engaphezu kokulawulwa okunengqondo kwe-VirtualMD, okuhlanganisa, ngaphandle komkhawulo, ukwehluleka komshini, i-elekthronikhi, noma ukuxhumana noma ukucekelwa phansi.
