privacyPledge.title: 1. Isithembiso Sobumfihlo Sedatha ye-VirtualMD.app
privacyPledge.intro: Kuhlelo lokusebenza lwe-VirtualMD, ubumfihlo nokuvikeleka kolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu kubaluleke kakhulu. Sizibophezele ekugcineni ubumfihlo nobuqotho bedatha osiphathise yona. Inkundla yethu iklanywe ngezinyathelo zokuphepha eziqinile ukuze kuvikelwe ulwazi lwakho ekufinyeleleni okungagunyaziwe, ukudalulwa, ukuguqulwa, nokucekelwa phansi.

secureInfo.title: Silwela ukugcina ulwazi lwakho luvikelekile.
secureInfo.description: Sisebenzisa amaphrothokholi okubethela asezingeni lomkhakha ngedatha esendleleni nasendaweni yokuphumula, eduze nezakhiwo zokuphepha ezinezendlalelo eziningi.

noPersonalUse.title: Asilusebenzisi ulwazi lwakho nganoma iyiphi indlela ongamhlonza ngayo ngezinjongo zangaphandle ngaphandle kwemvume yakho ecacile.
noPersonalUse.description: Ukusebenzisana kwakho okuqondile nemininingwane yomuntu siqu kungokwakho wedwa.

neverSell.title: Asisoze sathengisa ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu kubantu besithathu.
neverSell.description: Ukwethemba kwakho kubaluleke kakhulu, futhi sisekela lokhu ngokuqinisekisa ukuthi idatha yakho ayithengiswa.

anonymizedData.title: Sizosebenzisa idatha yakho engaziwa ukuze sithuthukise isistimu yethu.
anonymizedData.description: Ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukunemba, ukusebenza kahle, nokuphepha kwamamodeli wethu we-AI nezici zeplathifomu, sisebenzisa idatha enziwe yangaziwa futhi yahlanganiswa ngokuqinile. Lokhu kusho ukuthi lonke ulwazi lomuntu siqu oluhlonza umuntu (i-PII) luyasuswa, futhi idatha isetshenziswa ngendlela ehlanganisiwe engavumeli ukukhonjwa kwanoma yimuphi umsebenzisi ngamunye. Le nqubo ibalulekile ekufundeni okuqhubekayo nokwenza ngcono izinsizakalo esizihlinzeka kubo bonke abasebenzisi.

accountSecurity.title: Amazinga Okuphepha Kwe-akhawunti
accountSecurity.description: Ukuvikeleka kwedijithali kuncike ezingqimbeni zokuqinisekisa ukuze kuqinisekiswe ubunikazi bomsebenzisi. Lezi ngokuvamile zihlukaniswa njengezici:
accountSecurity.sfaDescription: Idinga isigaba esisodwa kuphela sokuqinisekisa, ngokuvamile iphasiwedi. Nakuba kuvamile, lena indlela evikeleke kancane njengoba amagama ayimfihlo angantshontshwa, aqagelelwe, noma aqhekezwe.
accountSecurity.tfaDescription: Idinga izinhlobo ezimbili ezihlukene zokuqinisekisa kusukela ezigabeni ezimbili ezihlukene (isb., into oyaziyo njengephasiwedi, kanye nento onayo njengekhodi yesikhathi esisodwa ethunyelwe ocingweni lwakho). Lokhu kuthuthukisa kakhulu ukuphepha.
accountSecurity.mfaTitle: Ukuqinisekiswa Kwezinto Ezintathu (3FA) / Ukuqinisekiswa Kwezinto Eziningi (MFA):
accountSecurity.mfaDescription: Idinga izinhlobo ezintathu noma ngaphezulu ezihlukene zokuqinisekisa. Isibonelo, iphasiwedi (yazi), ikhodi yesikhathi esisodwa nge-SMS (ba), kanye neskena sebhayomethrikhi njengesigxivizo somunwe (yizi). Lokhu kunikeza izinga eliphezulu kakhulu lokuphepha.

hipaaHistory.title: Umlando Omfishane kanye Nokubuka konke kwe-HIPAA
hipaaHistory.p1: Umthetho Wokuphatheka Komshuwalense Wezempilo Ka-1996 (HIPAA) umthetho wenhlangano yase-United States oklanyelwe ukuvikela ulwazi lwezempilo lwesiguli olubucayi ukuthi lungadalulwa ngaphandle kwemvume noma ulwazi lwesiguli. Iphinde ihlose ukwenza ngcono ukusebenza kahle kanye nokusebenza kahle kohlelo lokunakekelwa kwezempilo.
hipaaHistory.privacyRuleDescription: Isungula izindinganiso zikazwelonke zokuvikelwa kolwazi lwezempilo olukhonjwa ngazinye (Ulwazi Lwezempilo Oluvikelekile - PHI). Ibhekana nokusetshenziswa nokudalulwa kwe-PHI 'yizinhlangano ezikhaviwe.'
hipaaHistory.securityRuleDescription: Imisa amazinga kazwelonke okuvikela ubumfihlo, ubuqotho, nokutholakala kwe-PHI ye-elekthronikhi (ePHI). Idinga amabhizinisi akhaviwe ukuthi asebenzise izivikelo zokuphatha, ezingokwenyama, nezokusebenza.
hipaaHistory.breachRuleDescription: Idinga amabhizinisi akhaviwe kanye nabasebenzisana nabo ebhizinisini ukuthi banikeze isaziso kulandela ukwephulwa kwe-PHI engavikelekile.
hipaaHistory.coveredEntitiesDescription: Imithetho ye-HIPAA ngokuvamile isebenza ezinhlelweni zezempilo, izindawo zokunakekelwa kwezempilo, kanye nabahlinzeki bezempilo abenza imisebenzi ethile yokunakekelwa kwezempilo ngekhompyutha (isb., odokotela, imitholampilo, izibhedlela, amakhemisi, izinkampani zomshwalense).
hipaaHistory.hipaaMeaningDescription: Kodokotela nabanye abahlinzeki bezempilo, i-HIPAA igunyaza izivumelwano eziqinile zokuphatha idatha yesiguli, iqinisekisa ukuthi isetshenziselwa izinjongo ezivunyelwe kuphela (ukwelashwa, inkokhelo, ukuhlinzwa kokunakekelwa kwezempilo) noma ngokugunyazwa kwesiguli. Ezigulini, i-HIPAA inikeza amalungelo ngolwazi lwazo lwezempilo, okuhlanganisa namalungelo okuhlola nokuthola ikhophi yamarekhodi azo ezempilo, nokucela ukulungiswa.

VirtualMDSecurity.title: 3. Imikhuba Yokuphepha ye-VirtualMD.app
VirtualMDSecurity.intro: I-VirtualMD.app isebenzisa isu lokuvikeleka elinezendlalelo eziningi elidizayinelwe ukuvikela i-akhawunti yakho nolwazi lomuntu siqu, lidonsa ugqozi ezenzweni ezinhle kakhulu zokuvikela idatha. Nakuba sisebenza ngendlela ehlukile kunomhlinzeki wokunakekelwa kwezempilo wendabuko kumongo we-HIPAA, sinikeza izici zokuphepha eziqinile zabo bonke abasebenzisi:
VirtualMDSecurity.passwordEncryptionDescription: Wonke amagama ayimfihlo omsebenzisi abethelwe kusetshenziswa ama-algorithms e-hashing asezingeni lomkhakha. Lokhu kusho ukuthi asigcini iphasiwedi yakho yombhalo ongenalutho, sinikeza isendlalelo esibalulekile sokuphepha semininingwane ye-akhawunti yakho.
VirtualMDSecurity.twoFactorAuthDescription: Sigunyaza i-2FA kuwo wonke ama-akhawunti. Lokhu kudinga ukuthi uqinisekise ubuwena usebenzisa isici sesibili (imvamisa ikhodi ethunyelwa ku-imeyili yakho ebhalisiwe noma ocingweni) ngaphezu kwephasiwedi yakho, okunciphisa kakhulu ubungozi bokufinyelela i-akhawunti okungagunyaziwe.
VirtualMDSecurity.threeFactorAuthDescription: Ukuze uthole ukuvikeleka okuthuthukisiwe, i-VirtualMD.app inikezela ngokusethwa kokuqinisekisa kwezinto ezintathu ongakhetha kukho. Uma kunikwe amandla, ukufinyelela i-akhawunti yakho kungadinga iphasiwedi yakho, ikhodi ethunyelwe ekhelini lakho le-imeyili elibhalisiwe, KANYE nekhodi ethunyelwe nge-SMS enombolweni yakho yocingo yeselula eqinisekisiwe. Lokhu kudala umgoqo omkhulu emizamweni engagunyaziwe yokufinyelela ulwazi lwakho lwezokwelapha olugcinwe ngaphakathi kwenkundla yethu.
VirtualMDSecurity.dataEncryptionDescription: Ulwazi olugcinwe ku-akhawunti yakho yohlelo lokusebenza lwe-VirtualMD, okuhlanganisa nedatha yengxoxo, lubethelwa lapho uphumule. Idatha edluliswa phakathi kwedivayisi yakho neziphakeli zethu ibethelwa ekuhambeni kusetshenziswa izivumelwano ze-TLS/SSL.
VirtualMDSecurity.permanentDeletionDescription: Sikunikeza amandla okulawula idatha yakho. Unekhono lokususa unomphela izingxoxo ngazinye noma i-akhawunti yakho yonke. Uma selususiwe, lolu lwazi alubuyiseki ezinhlelweni zethu eziyinhloko, luhambisana nezimiso zokunciphisa idatha nokulawula komsebenzisi.
VirtualMDSecurity.outro: Lezi zinyathelo zihlinzeka ngezinga lokuphepha kwe-akhawunti eliqhathaniswa namasevisi amakhulu e-inthanethi aphatha idatha yomuntu siqu ebucayi, okuhloswe ngayo ukuqinisekisa ukuthi i-akhawunti yakho ye-VirtualMD.app kanye nolwazi olungaphakathi kuyo kuhlala kuyimfihlo futhi ngaphansi kolawulo lwakho.

hipaaConsiderations.title: 4. VirtualMD.app & HIPAA Ukucatshangelwa
hipaaConsiderations.p1: Ukuqonda ukuthi i-VirtualMD.app isebenzisana kanjani Nomthetho Wokuthwala Umshwalense Wezempilo Nokuziphendulela (HIPAA) kubalulekile kubasebenzisi bethu. Sizibophezele ngokujulile ekuvikelekeni nasekugcineni ubumfihlo bolwazi owabelana ngalo. Inkundla yethu ihlanganisa izinyathelo zokuphepha eziqinile, njengoba kuchazwe esigabeni "Imikhuba Yokuphepha ye-VirtualMD.app", okuhlanganisa ukubethela okuqinile kwedatha lapho uphumule futhi usendleleni, Ukuqinisekiswa Kwezinto Ezimbili Okubalulekile (2FA), kanye Nokuqinisekiswa Kwezinto Ezintathu (3FA) okungakhethwa.
hipaaConsiderations.p2: Nokho, kubalulekile ukuqonda ukuthi i-VirtualMD.app, kusevisi yayo yamanje ebhekene nabathengi, AYIhloselwe ukusetshenziswa ezimweni ezidinga ukuthotshelwa okusemthethweni kwe-HIPAA kokufaka okuqondile, ukugcinwa, noma ukucutshungulwa Kolwazi Lwezempilo Oluvikelwe (PHI) ngabasebenzisi abasebenza Njengezinkampani Ezikhaviwe ze-HIPAA noma Ababambisene Nabo Bebhizinisi. Abasebenzisi abadinga ukuthotshelwa okuqinile kwe-HIPAA kwe-PHI abayiphethe akufanele basebenzise inkundla yethu evamile ngezinjongo ezinjalo ngaphandle kwalapho kuneSivumelwano Esihlobene Nebhizinisi (BAA) esisendaweni ne-VirtualMD.app yalelo cala lokusebenzisa elizinikele. Kusevisi evamile, abasebenzisi akumele bafake noma yiluphi ulwazi olungalandelelwa emuva esigulini ngasinye umongo ongaphula i-HIPAA, ngaphandle kwemvume ecacile, enolwazi yaleso siguli evuma ukusetshenziswa kwale nkundla.
hipaaConsiderations.approachTitle: Indlela yethu: Ukulinganisa Ukwenziwa Kwezifiso Kwe-AI Okuthuthukisiwe Nobumfihlo Bedatha
hipaaConsiderations.p3: Ukuze sikunikeze izeluleko zezempilo ezithuthuke kakhulu, eziqaphela umongo, kanye nezeluleko eziqondene nawe zezempilo i-AI yethu ekwaziyo ukusenza, i-VirtualMD.app isebenzisa isistimu eyinkimbinkimbi lapho abantu bethu bezempilo be-AI bengafunda ekusebenzelaneni kwakho futhi babelane ngomongo ohlobene bodwa. Uchwepheshe wakho wezempilo womuntu we-AI, isibonelo, uklanyelwe ukugcina umongo kuzo zonke izikhathi kanye nama-AI akhethekile ahlukene ukuze anikeze ulwazi oluhlangene futhi oluhlakaniphe kakhudlwana.
hipaaConsiderations.p4: Le ndlela exhumene eqhutshwa yi-AI isho ukuthi izinjini ezihlukene ze-AI (ezingase isingathwe abahlinzeki abafana ne-OpenAI, i-Anthropic, i-Google, nabanye) zingase zicubungule izingxenye zedatha yengxoxo yakho engakhonjiwe noma eyenziwe mbumbulu noma izici zolwazi lwephrofayela yakho njengengxenye yokuletha le sevisi. Nakuba silungiselela ukusebenzisa kwethu lawa ma-AI API ezinkampani zangaphandle ukuze siwavimbele ekusebenziseni idatha yakho ukuze aqeqeshe amamodeli awo avamile (njengoba kuchazwe kabanzi esigabeni sethu esithi "Ukusetshenziswa Kwedatha Ngabahlinzeki Benjini Yenkampani Yesithathu Ye-AI"), yona kanye imvelo yale modeli ye-AI ethuthukisiwe, esabalalisiwe yehlukile kokwakudala, okuvamise ukugoqwa, ukuphathwa kwedatha ngaphakathi komhlinzeki wezokunakekelwa kwempilo ukuze kuthotshelwe amasistimu angaphakathi aqinile we-PAHIA akhelwe ukuthotshelwa kwe-AI.
hipaaConsiderations.p5: Sikholelwa ukuthi le ndlela isivumela ukuthi sinikeze ulwazi lwezempilo oluqhutshwa yi-AI olungenakuqhathaniswa nokusekelwa. Kodwa-ke, idinga ukuqonda okucacile: <strong style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>le ndawo eyinkimbinkimbi yokwenza kube ngokwakho kanye ne-inter-AI yokufunda, ngendlela yayo evamile yamanje, ihlanganisa imodeli yokuphatha idatha ehlukile kunesivikelo esithile sokuphatha, somzimba, nezobuchwepheshe kanye nezinqubo zokusebenza ezigunyazwe i-HIPAA Yezinkampani Ezikhaviwe ezilawula i-PII>
hipaaConsiderations.p6: Sisebenza ngokuzikhandla ukuze siqhubeke sithuthukisa ukuvikeleka kwedatha yethu futhi sihlola izindlela eziya ekuqondaneni okukhulu namazinga edatha aqondene nokunakekelwa kwezempilo kwezigaba ezihlukahlukene zesevisi noma okunikezwayo. Ngokusebenzisa isevisi evamile ye-VirtualMD.app, uvuma futhi uyamukela le bhalansi yamanje: ukusebenzisa i-AI ethuthukisiwe, exhumene ukuze uthole imininingwane yezokwelapha ephakeme kuhilela imodeli yokuphatha idatha ehlukile kunaleyo yomhlinzeki wokunakekelwa kwezempilo ovamile osebenza ngaphansi kwe-HIPAA.
hipaaConsiderations.p7: Uma umsebenzisi, ikakhulukazi uchwepheshe wezempilo, efisa ukuxoxa ngolwazi olungase lubhekisele kumuntu othile (isiguli), umthwalo wemfanelo wokuqinisekisa ukuthi uthole zonke izimvume ezidingekayo nezifanele ngokomthetho kulowo muntu. Imvume enjalo kufanele isho ngokucacile ukuqonda komuntu ukuthi ulwazi kuxoxwa ngalo kunkundla lapho, nakuba ivikelekile, ingasebenzi ngaphansi kweSivumelwano esisemthethweni se-HIPAA Business Associate nomsebenzisi walokho kusebenzelana okuthile nokuthi ukuphathwa kwedatha yenkundla kuyahluka kumasistimu avamile athobela i-HIPAA.
hipaaConsiderations.p8: Abasebenzisi abafisa ukudlulisa ulwazi okuxoxwe ngalo ku-VirtualMD.app kusistimu esemthethweni, ethobela i-HIPAA (isb., Irekhodi lezokwelapha likadokotela wabo) banesibopho sokwenza lokho ngokuphephile nangendlela ethobela yonke imithetho esebenzayo kanye nezinqubo ezimisiwe zomhlinzeki wabo.
hipaaConsiderations.alignmentTitle: Lapho Siqondana Nezimiso ze-HIPAA (Ngaphezu Kokuphepha Okujwayelekile)
hipaaConsiderations.userControlDescription: Sikunikeza amathuluzi okufinyelela nokususa unomphela izingxoxo zakho nolwazi lwe-akhawunti, ukuhambisana nezimiso zokunciphisa idatha kanye namalungelo omuntu ngamunye avame ukugcizelelwa emithethweni yobumfihlo.
hipaaConsiderations.anonymizationDescription: Ukusebenzisa kwethu idatha engaziwa, ehlanganisiwe yokuthuthukiswa kwesistimu kuwumkhuba okuthi, uma kwenziwa kahle, kuyindlela evamile yokuthuthukisa amasevisi e-AI kuyilapho kuvikela ubumfihlo bomuntu ngamunye.

userResponsibility.title: 5. Isibopho Somsebenzisi Nokusetshenziswa Okunesimilo
userResponsibility.intro: I-VirtualMD.app inikeza amathuluzi e-AI anamandla okufinyelela ulwazi lwezokwelapha nokuzibandakanya ezingxoxweni eziphathelene nempilo. Nakuba silwela ukunemba nokuvikeleka, ukusetshenziswa okunesibopho kwenkundla yethu kuwukuzibophezela okwabiwe. Ngokusebenzisa i-VirtualMD.app, uyavuma ukuthobela imihlahlandlela yokuziphatha futhi uqonde amakhono nemikhawulo yenkundla.
userResponsibility.noReviewDescription: Ukuze uvikele ubumfihlo bakho, izisebenzi ze-VirtualMD.app azibuyekezi njalo izingxoxo zakho eziyimfihlo nabantu bethu be-AI. Lokhu kugcizelela ukubaluleka kokusebenzisa kwakho inkundla ngokwethembeka.
userResponsibility.prohibitedContentTitle: Okuqukethwe Okunqatshelwe - Ukuzilimaza Mina Noma Kwabanye:
userResponsibility.prohibitedContentDescription: Uyavuma ukungasebenzisi i-VirtualMD.app ukuze ufune ulwazi noma isiqondiso sokuthi ungazilimaza kanjani wena noma abanye. Inkundla yethu ayiklanyelwe ukungenelela kwenhlekelele ezimeni ezinjalo. Uma uhlangabezana nemicabango yokuzilimaza noma ukulimaza abanye, sicela uthinte abezimo eziphuthumayo noma inombolo yocingo yocingo ngokushesha.
userResponsibility.consultPractitionerDescription: I-VirtualMD.app iyithuluzi lolwazi futhi AKUYONA indawo yeseluleko sezokwelapha esiqeqeshiwe, ukuxilongwa, noma ukwelashwa okuvela kumhlinzeki wezempilo oqeqeshiwe. Hlala uthintana nodokotela wakho noma omunye umsebenzi wezempilo oqeqeshiwe nganoma yiziphi izimo zezempilo ezibucayi noma ngaphambi kokwenza noma yiziphi izinqumo ezihlobene nempilo yakho.
userResponsibility.emergencySituationsDescription: I-VirtualMD.app AYIKWAZI ukukusukumela esimweni esiphuthumayo. Isibonelo, uma isistimu iphakamisa ukuthi ushayele ku-911 noma uye egumbini lezimo eziphuthumayo ngokusekelwe kulwazi olunikezayo, nguwe wedwa onesibopho sokuthatha leso senzo. Inkundla yethu ayinawo amandla okuthumela izinsiza eziphuthumayo.
userResponsibility.outro: Ukunamathela kwakho kule mihlahlandlela kuqinisekisa indawo ephephile nekhiqizayo kubo bonke abasebenzisi futhi kusiza ukugcina ubuqotho benqubo yokufuna ulwazi.

privacyScenarios.title: 6. Izimo Ezisebenzayo Zobumfihlo Nokucatshangelwa Okuthuthukile
privacyScenarios.scenario1Question: Uyabuza: "Ngifisa ukubuza ithimba le-AI le-VirtualMD.app mayelana nenkinga ehlobene nezempilo engakhululekile futhi ehlazisayo. Yini engivikelayo?"
privacyScenarios.scenario1Answer: Impendulo yethu: Siyaqonda ukuthi izingxoxo zezempilo zingaba ngumuntu siqu. Izendlalelo ezimbalwa zikuvikela:
privacyScenarios.confidentialConvosDescription: Izingxoxo zakho nabantu bethu be-AI zenzelwe ukuthi zibe yimfihlo. Njengoba kushiwo kuSifungo sethu Sobumfihlo, abasebenzi be-VirtualMD.app ababuyekezi njalo okuqukethwe kwakho okuyimfihlo.
privacyScenarios.dataEncryptionDescription: Yonke idatha yengxoxo ibethelwe kukho kokubili lapho kuthuthwa khona (phakathi kocingo lwakho neziphakeli zethu kusetshenziswa i-TLS/SSL) futhi lapho kuphumule khona (uma igcinwe kuzinqolobane zethu zolwazi).
privacyScenarios.accountSecurityDescription: I-akhawunti yakho ivikelwe yi-password yakho kanye nokuqinisekiswa kwe-Two-Factor Authentication (2FA), ngenketho yoQinisekiso Lwezinto Ezintathu (3FA), okwenza ukufinyelela okungagunyaziwe kumlando wakho wengxoxo kube nzima kakhulu.
privacyScenarios.deletionControlDescription: Unamandla okususa unomphela noma iyiphi ingxoxo ethile noma yonke i-akhawunti yakho nganoma yisiphi isikhathi, ngezindlela eziklanyelwe ukuthi zingabuyiseki kumasistimu ethu ayinhloko.
privacyScenarios.anonymizationDescription: Idatha engaziwa kuphela nehlanganisiwe (ekhishiwe zonke izihlonzi zomuntu siqu) isetshenziselwa ukuthuthukisa amamodeli ethu e-AI. Okuqukethwe kwengxoxo yakho yomuntu siqu, okuhlonzwa akusetshenziselwa le njongo ngaphandle kokungaziwa okunjalo.
privacyScenarios.scenario1Outro: Nakuba lezi zinyathelo zinikeza ukuvikeleka okuqinile, khumbula njalo ukuthi alukho uhlelo olungangeneki. Sikhuthaza abasebenzisi ukuthi baqaphele ulwazi ababelana ngalo, njengoba bebengenza kunoma yikuphi ukuxhumana kwedijithali.
privacyScenarios.scenario2Title: Isimo sesi-2: Ukugcina Ulwazi Lwephrofayela (isb., Imithi)
privacyScenarios.scenario2Question: Uyabuza: "Nginemithi ethile futhi ngifuna ukuyigcina kuphrofayela yami ukuze Isazi Sezempilo se-AI uCarol sibe nomxholo wezingxoxo ezintsha. Idatha yami ivikelwe kanjani ukuze kuphela ama-AI futhi kungabikho abantu abazofinyelela?"
privacyScenarios.scenario2Answer: Impendulo yethu: Ukugcina imininingwane yemithi kuphrofayela yakho kungathuthukisa isimo sezimpendulo ze-AI. Nansi indlela leyo datha evikelwa ngayo:
privacyScenarios.profileSecurityDescription: Njengedatha yengxoxo yakho, imininingwane yephrofayela yakho, okuhlanganisa nohlu lwemithi, ivikelwe ukuvikeleka kwe-akhawunti okufanayo (iphasiwedi, 2FA/3FA) nezinyathelo zokubethela (uphumule futhi usendleleni).
privacyScenarios.accessControlsDescription: Ukufinyelela kumarekhodi esizindalwazi somsebenzisi ngabasebenzi be-VirtualMD.app kulawulwa ngokuqinile, kukhawulelwe kubantu abagunyaziwe ngezidingo ezithile zokusebenza noma zosekelo (isb., ukusiza ngenkinga ye-akhawunti oyibikayo), futhi kubuswa izinqubomgomo zobumfihlo zangaphakathi nokugawulwa kwemithi. Ukuphequlula okujwayelekile kwedatha yephrofayela yomsebenzisi akuvunyelwe.
privacyScenarios.aiAccessDescription: Abantu be-AI, njengochwepheshe be-AI Yezempilo uCarol, bafinyelela izingxenye ezifanele zephrofayela yakho (njengohlu lwemithi, uma uzinikezile) ngokohlelo ukuze banikeze izimpendulo ezinomongo phakathi nezingxoxo zakho. Lokhu kufinyelela kuyingxenye yomqondo wokusebenza we-AI wokukusiza kangcono.
privacyScenarios.techNoteQuestion: Ubuze: "Kungenzeka yini ukugxeka imilayezo ukuze ngisho nabantu abaphethe inkampani bangakwazi ukuyifunda (njengamagama ayimfihlo) ngaphandle kwemvume ecacile?"
privacyScenarios.techNoteP1: Lokhu kubhekisela emicabangweni efana nokubethela ngasekugcineni (E2EE) lapho kuphela umsebenzisi wokugcina ophethe ukhiye wokugcina wokususa ukubethela. I-VirtualMD.app isebenzisa okuqinile ukubethela lapho uphumule kuyo yonke idatha ebucayi, okuhlanganisa umlando wakho wengxoxo kanye nolwazi lwephrofayela, kusetshenziswa ama-algorithms aqinile, asezingeni lomkhakha. Lokhu kusho ukuthi idatha egcinwe kusizindalwazi sethu ibethelwe.
privacyScenarios.techNoteP2: Nakuba okwamanje singasebenzisi ukhiye othize wesistimu ye-E2EE yedatha yengxoxo engenza kungenzeki ngokobuchwepheshe ngabalawuli besistimu abagunyaziwe ukuthi basuse ukubethela (okufana nokuthi mangaki amasevisi wamafu asebenzayo), ukufinyelela kudatha ebethelwe eyisisekelo kukhawulelwe kakhulu, kufakwe kulogi, futhi kubuswa izinqubomgomo eziqinile zokuphepha kwangaphakathi nezinqubomgomo zobumfihlo. Abasebenzi bethu banqatshelwe ukufinyelela okuqukethwe kwengxoxo yakho yangasese ngaphandle kwangaphansi kwezimo eziqondile nezilawulwayo, njengokuphendula isicelo sokwesekwa esiqondile esivela kuwe mayelana nengxoxo ethile noma njengoba kudingwa umthetho. Le ndlela ilinganisa ukuvikeleka okuqinile nezidingo zokusebenza zokunakekela nokusekela inkundla.
privacyScenarios.techNoteP3: Iphasiwedi ye-akhawunti yakho, nokho, iphathwa ngendlela ehlukile: isheshisiwe futhi inosawoti, okusho ukuthi asilokothi sigcine iphasiwedi yakho yangempela futhi asikwazi ukuyithola.
privacyScenarios.thirdPartyDataTitle: Ukusetshenziswa Kwedatha Ngabahlinzeki Benjini Yeqembu Le-AI
privacyScenarios.thirdPartyDataQuestion: Uphinde wabuza: "Ingabe ama-API ezinjini ze-AI esizisebenzisayo ayakwazi ukuvikeleka ekusebenziseni ukuqeqeshwa (a) yi-VirtualMD.app (b) OpenAI, (c) Anthropic...njll...? Noma ingabe wonke avikelwe i-priori ngokuzenzakalelayo?"
privacyScenarios.thirdPartyDataAnswer: Lesi isici esibalulekile sokuphatha idatha yethu:
privacyScenarios.VirtualMDTrainingDescription: Njengoba kushiwo kuSifungo sethu Sobumfihlo, sisebenzisa kuphela idatha engaziwa nehlanganisiwe ukuze sithuthukise kwangaphakathi nokuqeqeshwa kwamasistimu ethu obunikazi kanye nengqondo yokuxhumanisa i-AI. Idatha yakho ehlonza umuntu siqu noma okuqukethwe kwengxoxo eluhlaza akusetshenziselwa le njongo ngaphandle kokungaziwa okunjalo.
privacyScenarios.thirdPartyTrainingTitle: (b, c, njll.) Abahlinzeki Benkampani Yangaphandle ye-AI API (isb., OpenAI, Anthropic):
privacyScenarios.thirdPartyTrainingDescription: I-VirtualMD.app ikhetha ngokucophelela futhi ihlanganiswe nabahlinzeki abahamba phambili bemodeli ye-AI. Ngamasevisi afinyelelwa ngama-API abo (I-Application Programming Interfaces), abahlinzeki abakhulu abafana ne-OpenAI ne-Anthropic banezinqubomgomo zokusetshenziswa kwedatha ngokuvamile ezisho ukuthi idatha ehanjiswe ngama-API wabo AYISENZISWE yibo ukuze baqeqeshe amamodeli abo ayisisekelo avamile. Simisa ukusebenzisa kwethu lezi zinsiza ukuze kuhambisane nalezi zinketho zokulondoloza ubumfihlo. Sikukhuthaza ukuthi uphinde ubuyekeze izinqubomgomo zokusetshenziswa kwedatha zalaba bahlinzeki be-AI abayisisekelo uma unezinto ezithile ezikukhathazayo.
privacyScenarios.outro: Sizibophezele ekuqinisekiseni ukuthi ukusebenzisana kwakho akugcini nje ngokubonisa ulwazi kodwa futhi kuphathwa ngenhlonipho yobumfihlo bakho kuyo yonke inkundla yethu kanye nozakwethu bethu bezobuchwepheshe.

conclusion.title: 7. Isiphetho Nezinto Ezibalulekile Ezithathwayo
conclusion.intro: I-VirtualMD.app inikezelwe ekunikeni amandla abasebenzisi ngolwazi lwezempilo olufinyelelekayo noluqondakalayo nge-AI ethuthukisiwe. Sibeka phambili ukuphepha kwedatha yakho yomuntu siqu ngezinyathelo eziqinile ezihlanganisa ukuqinisekiswa kwezinto eziningi kanye nokubethela. Nakuba silwela ukuthola izindinganiso eziphakeme kakhulu zokuvikela idatha, inkundla yethu evamile ayithathi indawo yezinsizakalo ezithobelana ngokusemthethweni ne-HIPAA ekunakekelweni kwesiguli okuqondile ngabahlinzeki bezempilo abathile. Abasebenzisi kufanele baqonde lokhu kwehluka futhi basebenzise i-VirtualMD.app ngokuzibophezela nangokuziphatha.
conclusion.privacyPriorityDescription: Sivikela idatha yakho futhi ngeke sithengise imininingwane yakho siqu.
conclusion.anonymizedDataDescription: Sisebenzisa idatha engabonakali ukuze sithuthukise i-AI yethu nezinsizakalo zeplathifomu.
conclusion.accountSecurityDescription: Sihlinzeka nge-2FA (eyimpoqo) kanye ne-3FA (ongakukhetha) ukuze kuvikelwe i-akhawunti, uma kuqhathaniswa namasevisi ahamba phambili aku-inthanethi.
conclusion.dataControlDescription: Ungakwazi ukususa unaphakade izingxoxo kanye ne-akhawunti yakho.
conclusion.hipaaConsiderationsDescription: Isevisi evamile ye-VirtualMD.app ayiyona Inhlangano Ekhaviwe ye-HIPAA. Sivikela idatha kodwa siyahluka ekuthobeleni okusemthethweni kwe-HIPAA yokunakekelwa kwesiguli okuqondile nabahlinzeki abathile.
conclusion.ethicalUseDescription: Ungasebenzisi ukuzilimaza/ukulimaza abanye. Hlala uthintana nochwepheshe bezempilo ukuze uthole izimo ezibucayi. Asikwazi ukuthumela izinsiza eziphuthumayo.
conclusion.outro: Sikukhuthaza ukuthi usebenzise i-VirtualMD.app njengethuluzi elinamandla lokufunda nokuhlola, elihlala lihambisana nesiqondiso esivela kochwepheshe bezempilo abaqeqeshiwe. Ukuqonda kwakho lezi zinqubomgomo kusisiza ukuthi sigcine inkundla ephephile, evikelekile, nesebenzayo yawo wonke umuntu.

imagingAIExplainer.title: Ukuqonda i-AI Ezithombeni Zezempilo
imagingAIExplainer.subtitle: Umhlahlandlela olula wokuthi amakhompyutha abasiza kanjani ochwepheshe bezempilo babone ngokucacile.
imagingAIExplainer.author: Kuchazwe ngu: Ron Rubin, PhD (VirtualMD.app Technologies)

whatIsImaging.title: Ziyini Izithombe Zezempilo (Ukufanekisa)?
whatIsImaging.intro: Cabanga ngesithombe sempilo njengokuthatha izithombe ngaphakathi emzimbeni wakho. Ongoti bezempilo basebenzisa imishini ekhethekile ukwenza lezi zithombe, okubasiza ukuthi babone amathambo, izitho zomzimba, izicubu nemithambo yegazi ngaphandle kokuhlinzwa. Isibonelo, i-X-ray inhle kakhulu ekuboneni amathambo ukuze kutholwe ukuphuka, kuyilapho i-CT scan inikeza umbono oningiliziwe, ohlukanisayo wesitho esinjengobuchopho.

types.ctScans: CT Scans: Njenge-super-detailed, i-3D X-ray, ebonisa "izingcezu" zomzimba.
types.mriScans: Izikena ze-MRI: Isebenzisa omazibuthe abanamandla ukuze uthole izithombe ezicace kakhulu zezicubu ezithambile, njengobuchopho, imisipha, noma imisipha.
types.ultrasound: I-Ultrasound: Isebenzisa amaza omsindo ukubona izitho futhi, ngokuvamile, ukuhlola izingane ngesikhathi sokukhulelwa.
types.microscope: Amaslayidi e-Microscope: Amasampula amathishu amancane abukwa ngesibonakhulu ukuze kuhlolwe izifo ezingeni lamaselula (Pathology).
types.eyePhotos: Izithombe Zamehlo: Izithombe ezikhethekile zangaphakathi kweso ukuze zihlolwe izimo ezifana ne-diabetesic retinopathy (I-Ophthalmology).
types.cameraScopes: Amaphilisi/Izikophu Zekhamera: Amakhamera amancane ayesetshenziselwa ukubuka ngaphakathi kwesistimu yokugaya ukudla (Gastroenterology).

whatIsImaging.outro: Lezi zithombe zingamathuluzi abalulekile asiza ochwepheshe bezempilo bahlonze izifo, bahlole ukuthi ukwelashwa kusebenza kahle kangakanani, noma bahlole izinkinga ezingaba khona kusenesikhathi.

whatIsAI.title: Yini i-Artificial Intelligence (AI)?
whatIsAI.intro: I-AI empeleni isayensi yokufundisa amakhompyutha ukwenza imisebenzi evamise ukudinga ubuhlakani bomuntu, njengokufunda ezibonelweni, ukuxazulula izinkinga, nokwenza izinqumo. Emfanekisweni wezempilo, singacabanga nge-AI njengomsizi ohlakaniphe kakhulu wochwepheshe bezempilo.
whatIsAI.process: Isebenzisa izinhlelo ezikhethekile zekhompiyutha (algorithms) eziqeqeshwe ezinkulungwaneni, noma ezigidini, zezithombe zezokwelapha. Ngokuhlaziya le datha eningi, i-AI ifunda ukubona amaphethini acashile—amanye awo okunzima ngeso lomuntu ukuwabona, noma amaphethini abonisa amathuba aphezulu esifo esithile. Inqubo eyisisekelo ukuthi idatha (izithombe) ifakwa ku-AI, ebese ikhiqiza ukuqonda, njengokumaka indawo esolisayo.

howAIHelps.title: I-AI Ingasiza Kanjani Ngezithombe Zezempilo?
howAIHelps.intro: Ucwaningo lwethu lwesayensi lugqamisa izindlela ezimbalwa ezibalulekile i-AI isivele yenza umehluko:

accuracy.title: Ukuthola Izinkinga Ngokunembe Kakhudlwana
accuracy.description: Kwesinye isikhathi, izimpawu zokuqala zesifo zingaba ezicashile ngendlela emangalisayo futhi kube lula ukuphuthelwa lapho kuskenwa. I-AI ingasebenza njengepheya lesibili lamehlo aqaphile, ihlole ngokuhlelekile zonke izingxenye zesithombe futhi igqamise izindawo ezidinga ukubhekisiswa eduze. Isibonelo, i-AI ingase idwebe indilinga ezungeza iqoqo elincane lamaseli ku-mammogram okungaba inkomba yokuqala yomdlavuza.
accuracy.example: Isibonelo: Kumammograms (ama-X-reyi webele), olunye ucwaningo lwabonisa ukuthi i-AI isize ukuthola umdlavuza ongu-29% ngaphezulu ngaphandle kokuhlaba umkhosi ngokungalungile abasebenzisi abanempilo enhle. Kumakholonoscopies (ibheka okumila okubizwa ngokuthi ama-polyps), i-AI yasiza ochwepheshe bezempilo ukuthi bathole ama-polyp okungenzeka abe nomdlavuza wangaphambi komdlavuza ngokuwagqamisa ngesikhathi sangempela kokuphakelayo kwevidiyo.

speed.title: Ukusheshisa Izinto
speed.description: Ukufunda izithombe zezokwelapha, ikakhulukazi eziyinkimbinkimbi njengama-CT scan agcwele umzimba wonke, kuthatha isikhathi esiningi nokugxilisa ingqondo. I-AI ingasheshisa le nqubo ngendlela emangalisayo. Ingakwazi ukuhlunga kusengaphambili amakesi, imake aphuthuma kakhulu ukuze abuyekezwe ngokushesha, noma isingathe imisebenzi yokuhlola evamile ukuze ikhulule isikhathi sochwepheshe.
speed.example: Isibonelo: Uhlelo lwe-AI lokuhlola izithombe zamehlo ngezimpawu zokulimala kwesifo sikashukela (i-diabetesic retinopathy) lunganikeza umphumela ngokushesha emtholampilo wokunakekelwa okuyisisekelo. Lokhu kusho ukuthi iziguli akumele zilinde isikhathi sokubonana nochwepheshe wamehlo ukuze nje zihlolwe, okuholela ekunakekelweni okusheshayo kwabantu abengeziwe. Kwesinye isifundo esikhulu, i-AI yasiza ukunciphisa isikhathi izazi ze-radiologists ezisichitha zifunda ama-mammogram cishe ngesigamu.

consistency.title: Ukwenza Ukuxilongwa Kuhambisane Kakhulu
consistency.description: Ngisho naphakathi kochwepheshe, kungase kube nokuhluka okuncane, okuzimele kokuthi isithombe sihunyushwa kanjani. I-AI inikeza ukuhlaziya okujwayelekile, okuyinhloso ngaso sonke isikhathi, okusiza ukunciphisa lokhu kuhlukahluka.
consistency.example: Isibonelo: Uma ubheka amasampula ezicubu ngaphansi kwesibonakhulu (i-pathology), ukucacisa "ibanga" eliqondile lesimila kwesinye isikhathi kungaba yindida. Uhlelo lwe-AI, oluqeqeshwe kudatha olugunyazwe yiphaneli yochwepheshe, lunganikeza ibanga elingaguquki, liqinisekise ukuthi imiphumela ifana kakhulu futhi ithembekile kubo bonke ochwepheshe bezempilo abahlukene nezikhungo.

challenges.title: Ingabe i-AI Iphelele?
challenges.intro: Cha, futhi kubalulekile ukuqonda ukulinganiselwa kwakho. Nakuba i-AI inamandla, kunezinselelo ezibalulekile okufanele kubhekwane nazo:
challenges.bias: Ubulungiswa Nokuchema: I-AI yinhle kuphela njengedatha eqeqeshwe ngayo. Uma iqeqeshwe kuphela ezithombeni ezivela eqenjini elilodwa labantu, ingase ingasebenzi kahle nakwabanye. Ukuqinisekisa idatha yokuqeqeshwa ehlukahlukene kubalulekile ukuvimbela ukuchema.
challenges.uncommonCases: Izimo Ezingavamile: I-AI iphumelela kakhulu ekuboneni amaphethini ewabone izikhathi eziningi. Ingase ilwe nezifo ezingavamile noma izethulo ezingajwayelekile engazange iqeqeshwe ngayo.
challenges.teamwork: Ukubaluleka Komsebenzi Wethimba: Indlela engcono kakhulu ukusebenzisana kwabantu ne-AI. I-AI iyithuluzi *lokusiza* ochwepheshe bezempilo ngokuphatha imisebenzi edinga idatha, kodwa ayithathi indawo yokuhlangenwe nakho kwabo, uzwela, nekhono lokuqonda wonke umsebenzisi.
challenges.regulation: Ukuphepha Nokulawula: Njenganoma iyiphi idivayisi yezempilo entsha, amathuluzi e-AI adinga ukuhlolwa okuqinile, ukuqinisekiswa, nokuqapha okuqhubekayo ukuze enze isiqiniseko sokuthi aphephile, ayasebenza, futhi anikeza izinzuzo zangempela kubasebenzisi.
challenges.outro: Abacwaningi nabalawuli basebenza kanzima ukubhekana nalezi zinselele. Umgomo ukuhlanganisa i-AI ekunakekelweni kwezempilo ngokuphepha nangempumelelo ukuze kuthuthukiswe imiphumela yesiguli.

conclusion.title: Ngamafuphi
conclusion.text: I-AI isiba uzakwethu obalulekile ekucabangeni kwezempilo, esiza ochwepheshe bezempilo bathole izifo kusenesikhathi, ngokushesha, nangokwethembeka. Kufana nokunikeza ochwepheshe bezempilo umbono othuthukisiwe kanye nomsizi ongakhathali ukuze abuyekeze izithombe eziyinkimbinkimbi, ekugcineni okuholela ekunakekelweni okungcono kwabasebenzisi.

mentalHealthWhitepaper.title: I-AI Kwezempilo Yengqondo: Intuthuko, Izinselele, kanye Nezicelo Zomtholampilo
mentalHealthWhitepaper.authors: Ron Rubin, PhD kanye noSandy Miles

disclaimer.title: Umshwana Wokuzikhipha Emthwalweni Obalulekile
disclaimer.text: Nakuba i-VirtualMD.app inikezela ngobuchwepheshe be-AI obusezingeni eliphezulu bokuhlolwa nosizo lwezempilo yengqondo, kubalulekile ukuqonda ukuthi amasistimu ethu e-AI, kungakhathaliseki ukuthi ayinkimbinkimbi kangakanani, AKUKHO indawo yochwepheshe bezempilo yengqondo abanelayisensi. Ulwazi nemininingwane enikeziwe kufanele ngaso sonke isikhathi ihlolwe abahlinzeki bezempilo abaqeqeshiwe. Esimeni esiphuthumayo sezempilo yengqondo, sicela ushayele ku-911 (US), 999 (UK), 112 (EU), 101 (Israel), noma 911 (Canada) ngokushesha, noma uye emnyangweni wezimo eziphuthumayo oseduze nawe. Kunoma yikuphi ukukhathazeka ngempilo yengqondo noma izinqumo zokwelashwa, hlala uthintana nabahlinzeki bokunakekelwa kwezempilo abaqeqeshiwe. Ubuchwepheshe be-VirtualMD.app buklanyelwe ukuthuthukisa nokusekela ukunakekelwa kwezempilo kwengqondo okuphrofeshinali, hhayi esikhundleni sako.

abstract.title: Abstract
abstract.text: Leli phepha lihlola indima ethuthukayo ngokushesha yobuhlakani bokwenziwa ekunakekelweni kwezengqondo, ligqamisa intuthuko yakamuva, ubufakazi bokusebenza ngempumelelo, kanye nezinselelo zokuqalisa. Sibuyekeza intuthuko kuzo zonke izizinda ezine: ukwesekwa kokuxilonga, izinhlelo zokusebenza zokwelapha, ukuqapha kwesiguli, nezibalo zokubikezela. Ucwaningo lwakamuva lwemitholampilo lubonisa ukuthi izinhlelo ze-AI zingafinyelela ukunemba okungama-80-92% ekutholeni ukucindezeleka okukhulu okuvela emaphethini olimi nama-biomarker ezwi, kuyilapho ama-algorithms okubona ngekhompyutha angakwazi ukuhlonza ingozi yokufuna ukuzibulala ngokuzwela okungama-85% ngokuhlaziya isimo sobuso nokunyakaza okuncane. Amamodeli okucubungula ulimi lwemvelo aqeqeshelwe ezingxoxweni zokwelapha abonisa isithembiso ekuletheni izimiso zokwelapha ngokuziphatha, ngezivivinyo ezilawulwa ngokungahleliwe ezibonisa ukusebenza kahle okuqhathaniswa nabelaphi babantu ngokucindezeleka nokukhathazeka okumaphakathi kuya kokumaphakathi (Iphephabhuku Lokucwaninga Nge-inthanethi Kwezokwelapha, 2022). Ama-smartphone-based passive monitoring systems angathola izimpawu eziyisixwayiso zakuqala zokuphinda agule ngokwengqondo kuze kufike ezinsukwini eziyi-7 ngaphambi kokuthi kubonakale ukuwohloka komtholampilo (JAMA Psychiatry, 2021). Naphezu kwalezi ntuthuko, izinselele ezibalulekile zisekhona, okuhlanganisa ukuchema kwe-algorithm, ukuqinisekiswa okulinganiselwe kubantu abahlukahlukene, ukukhathazeka kobumfihlo, nokuhlanganiswa kokugeleza komsebenzi okukhona komtholampilo. Sixoxa ngezimiso zokuziphatha, izinhlaka zokulawula, nezindlela zokuhlola ze-AI yezempilo yengqondo. Nakuba ubuchwepheshe be-AI bubonisa isithembiso esikhulu sokwandisa ukufinyelela ekunakekelweni kwengqondo nokuthuthukisa ukusebenza kahle kokwelashwa, kufanele kuthuthukiswe futhi kusetshenziswe ngaphakathi kohlaka olubanzi olubeka phambili ukuqinisekiswa komtholampilo, ukucatshangelwa kwezimiso zokuziphatha, kanye nokusetshenziswa okugxile kumuntu ukuze kuthuthukiswe ngempela imiphumela yezempilo yengqondo.

introduction.title: Isingeniso
introduction.text: Umthwalo wokugula ngengqondo uveza enye yezinselelo ezicindezela kakhulu zokunakekelwa kwezempilo...
introduction.p1: Umthwalo wokugula ngengqondo uveza enye yezinselelo ezicindezela kakhulu zokunakekelwa kwempilo. Cishe umuntu oyedwa kwabahlanu emhlabeni wonke uba nokuphazamiseka kwempilo yengqondo minyaka yonke, ukucindezeleka kukodwa kuthinta abantu abangaphezu kwezigidi ezingu-300 emhlabeni jikelele (WHO, 2022). Khonamanjalo, ukushoda kwabasebenzi okuqhubekayo kunciphisa ukufinyelela ekunakekelweni - I-World Health Organization ilinganisela ukushoda komhlaba wonke kochwepheshe bezempilo yengqondo abayizigidi ezingu-1.18. Leli gebe eliphakathi kwesidingo nezinsiza ezitholakalayo likhulise intshisekelo ezisombululweni ezisekelwe kubuchwepheshe, ikakhulukazi izinhlelo zobuhlakani bokwenziwa (AI) ezingase zibe namandla okunweba ukufinyelela nokusebenza ngempumelelo kwezinsizakalo zezempilo yengqondo.
introduction.p2: Ukuhlangana kwe-AI nempilo yengqondo kubonise ukukhula okumangalisayo kule minyaka eyishumi edlule. Kusukela kumathuluzi okuhlola azenzakalelayo nama-ejenti ezingxoxo kuya ekuhlaziyeni okubikezelayo ukuze kunqandwe ukuphindeka, izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-AI kudokotela wengqondo nesayensi yengqondo zikhule ngendlela emangalisayo. Lokhu kuziphendukela kwemvelo kunikwe amandla intuthuko ekucutshungulweni kolimi lwemvelo, ukufunda ngomshini, umbono wekhompyutha, nokwanda kwamathuba e-digital phenotyping ngama-smartphone namadivayisi agqokekayo.
introduction.p3: Impilo yengqondo iletha izinselelo eziyingqayizivele namathuba okuqaliswa kwe-AI. Ngokungafani nochwepheshe abaningi bezokwelapha, ukuhlola kwengqondo kuncike kakhulu ekubikeni okucabangelayo, ukuziphatha okuqaphelekayo, amaphethini olimi, nezici zomongo esikhundleni sokuhlolwa kwaselabhorethri noma izithombe. Lokhu kuhambisana kahle namakhono akhulayo e-AI ekuqondeni ulimi, ukubonwa kwephethini kudatha yokuziphatha, nokuhlaziywa kwezindlela eziningi zokukhuluma ngokomzwelo.
introduction.p4: Leli phepha linikeza ukubuyekezwa okuphelele kwezicelo ze-AI zamanje ekunakekelweni kwengqondo, ukuhlola isisekelo sobufakazi bokusebenza kwazo, izindlela zemethodological, izinselele zokuqalisa, kanye nokucatshangelwa kokuziphatha. Sihlela ukuhlaziya kwethu ezizindeni ezine eziyinhloko: amasistimu okusekela ukuxilonga, izinhlelo zokusebenza zokwelapha, ukuqapha kwesiguli, nokuhlaziya okubikezelayo kokuhlela ukwelashwa. Endaweni ngayinye, sihlola isimo samanje sobuchwepheshe, sifingqa okutholakele okubalulekile kocwaningo, futhi sihlonze izikhala ezibalulekile ezidinga uphenyo olwengeziwe.
introduction.p5: Kubalulekile ukuqaphela ukuthi naphezu kwentuthuko enkulu, amathuluzi e-AI empilweni yengqondo ahloselwe ukukhulisa, hhayi esikhundleni, odokotela babantu. Ubudlelwano bokwelapha phakathi kwesiguli nomhlinzeki buhlala buyisisekelo ekunakekelweni kwengqondo okusebenzayo. Izinhlelo zokusebenza ezithembisayo kakhulu zisebenzisa i-AI ukwandisa amakhono abahlinzeki, ukuthuthukisa ukusebenza kahle, ukunika amandla ukungenelela kwangaphambi kwesikhathi, futhi okungenzeka kwandise ukufinyelela ekunakekelweni okusekelwe ebufakazini kubantu abangagciniwe.

methods.title: Izindlela/Ubuchwepheshe
methods.text: Izinhlelo zesimanje ze-AI empilweni yengqondo zisebenzisa izindlela ezehlukene...
methods.p1: Izinhlelo zesimanje ze-AI empilweni yengqondo zisebenzisa izindlela ezehlukene zezindlela, ngayinye inezinzuzo ezithile zezinhlelo zokusebenza zomtholampilo ezahlukene. Izisekelo ezibalulekile zobuchwepheshe zifaka ukucubungula ulimi lwemvelo (NLP), ukufunda ngomshini (ML), umbono wekhompyutha, kanye ne-digital phenotyping.
methods.p2: Ukucubungula Ulimi Lwemvelo (NLP) kwakha umgogodla wezinhlelo eziningi ze-AI zempilo yengqondo, okuvumela ukuhlaziya okuqukethwe kolimi namaphethini okuxhumana. Amamodeli asekelwe ku-transformer athuthukisiwe afana ne-BERT (Ukumeleleka kwe-Bidirectional Encoder kusuka ku-Transformers) kanye nokwehluka kwe-GPT (Generative Pre-trained Transformer) avumela amasistimu ukuthi ahumushe ukulandisa komtholampilo, okulotshiweyo kweseshini yokwelapha, nombhalo okhiqizwe isiguli ngokuqonda okuthuthukayo komongo, imizwa, nokuqukethwe kwengqondo. Lawa mamodeli angakwazi ukuhlonza omaka bolimi abahlobene nezimo ezithile, njengokuncishiswa kokwenziwa kwe-syntactic ekucindezelekeni noma ukuphazamiseka kokuhlangana kwe-semantic ezinkingeni zengqondo. Izinhlelo ze-NLP zomtholampilo ezithuthuke kakhulu zicushwe kahle kunkampani eqondene nempilo yengqondo, okuhlanganisa namanothi omtholampilo angaziwa, imibhalo yokwelapha, namathuluzi okuhlola okungokwengqondo aqinisekisiwe.
methods.p3: Izindlela Zokufunda Ngomshini ekuhlukaniseni okugadwayo kwezempilo yengqondo (kwezinhlelo zokusebenza zokuxilonga), ukuhlanganisa okungagadiwe (ukuthola amaphethini ezimpawu zamanoveli), ukufunda okuqinisiwe (ukungenelela komuntu siqu), futhi ngokuya, ukufunda okujulile kokuhlanganiswa kwedatha yezindlela eziningi. Idatha yokuqeqesha ngokuvamile ihlanganisa ukuhlolwa komtholampilo okuhleliwe (isb., i-PHQ-9 yokucindezeleka, i-GAD-7 yokukhathazeka), izinyathelo zokuziphatha, amasignali okuphila, kanye nedatha yerekhodi yezempilo ye-elekthronikhi. Izindlela zokuqinisekisa ngokuvamile zisebenzisa i-k-fold cross-validation kanye namasethi okuhlola angaphandle, nokusebenza okuhlolwe kusetshenziswa ukuzwela, ukucaciswa, amanani aqagelayo amahle/abi, kanye nendawo engaphansi kwejika lesici somamukeli (AUC-ROC).
methods.p4: Izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-Computer Vision zihlaziya isimo sobuso, amaphethini emoto, nokuziphatha okungakhulumi okuhlotshaniswa nezimo zengqondo. Amanethiwekhi e-Convolutional neural namamodeli esikhashana (isb., amanethiwekhi e-LSTM) angathola izinkulumo ezincane, amaphethini wokubuka, nezinguquko ze-psychomotor ezingase zibonise izimo zemizwa noma ukubonakaliswa kwezimpawu. Lezi zinhlelo zibaluleke kakhulu ezimeni lapho ukuhlonzwa kwezinsiza zokuziphatha, njenge-autism spectrum disorders noma izimpawu ze-catatonic ekuguleni kwengqondo okukhulu.
methods.p5: I-Digital Phenotyping imele indlela esafufusa esebenzisa ukuqoqwa kwedatha engenzi lutho kusuka kuma-smartphone namadivayisi agqokekayo ukukhomba amaphethini okuziphatha ahlotshaniswa nezimo zengqondo. Lawa masistimu ahlaziya idatha ye-geolocation, amaleveli omsebenzi, amaphethini okulala, imvamisa yokuxhumana komphakathi, amandla okuthayipha, nezici zezwi ukuze akhe ama-biomarker edijithali wesimo sempilo yengqondo. Le ndlela ivumela ukuqapha okuqhubekayo, kwemvelo ngaphandle kwezilungiselelo zomtholampilo, okungase kuvumele ukutholwa kusengaphambili kwezinguquko zezimpawu.
methods.p6: Izinhlaka zokuhlanganisa ziya ngokuya zihlanganisa izindlela eziningi zokuhlola okuphelele. Isibonelo, amasistimu angase ahlaziye okuqukethwe kolimi ngokuhambisana nokuzwakala kwezwi kanye nesimo sobuso phakathi nezingxoxo zomtholampilo ukuze kuthuthukiswe ukunemba kokuxilonga. Ngokufanayo, izinhlelo zokusebenza zokwelapha zingase zihlanganise ukuhlaziywa kwemizwa kokushintshana kombhalo nedatha yokuqapha engenzi lutho ukuze kwenziwe kube ngokwakho isikhathi sokungenela kanye nokuqukethwe.
methods.p7: Izindlela zokuhlola zezinhlelo zezempilo yengqondo ze-AI zihlanganisa amamethrikhi endabuko okunemba kokuxilonga (ukuzwela, ukucacisa, i-AUC), ukuhlolwa kokusebenziseka, kanye nokwandayo, izilinganiso zemiphumela yomtholampilo ezivela ezivivinyweni ezizayo. Izindinganiso zegolide zokuqhathanisa ziyahlukahluka ngokusebenza kodwa ngokuvamile zihlanganisa izingxoxo zomtholampilo ezihlelekile, amathuluzi okuhlola aqinisekisiwe, kanye nokuxilongwa kokuvumelana kodokotela. Ucwaningo lwakamuva oluningi lisebenzisa imiklamo yesilingo esilawulwa ngokungahleliwe ukuze kuhlolwe ukunakekelwa kwe-AI-augmented ngokumelene nokwelashwa njengokujwayelekile.
methods.p8: Izindlela zokubala ezigcina ubumfihlo zibaluleke kakhulu ezinhlelweni zempilo yengqondo uma kubhekwa uhlobo olubucayi lwedatha yezengqondo. Lokhu kufaka phakathi ukufunda okuhlanganyelwe (lapho amamodeli eqeqeshwa kuwo wonke amasayithi amaningi ngaphandle kokuhlanganisa idatha), izindlela zobumfihlo ezihlukile, nokubala okuvikelekile kwamaqembu amaningi. Lezi zindlela zisiza ukulinganisela isidingo samasethi edatha okuqeqeshwa amakhulu, ahlukahlukene kanye nezidingo zezimiso zokuziphatha zokuvikela idatha.

diagnosticSupport.title: I-AI ku-Diagnostic Support
diagnosticSupport.text: Amasistimu e-AI abonise amandla athembisayo ekusekeleni ukuxilongwa kwezempilo yengqondo ...
diagnosticSupport.p1: Amasistimu e-AI abonise amandla athembisayo ekusekeleni ukuxilongwa kwezempilo yengqondo kuzo zonke izimo eziningana. Lawa mathuluzi ahlaziya imithombo yedatha eyahlukahlukene ehlanganisa izingxoxo zomtholampilo, izimpendulo zemibuzo, amaphethini enkulumo, isimo sobuso, nokuziphatha kwedijithali ukuze kuhlonzwe izimpawu zesiginesha zokuphazamiseka kwengqondo.
diagnosticSupport.p2: Ekutholeni ukucindezeleka, ama-algorithms e-NLP ahlaziya izici zolimi athole impumelelo ephawulekayo. Ucwaningo lwango-2021 ku-JAMA Psychiatry lwahlola uhlelo lwe-NLP oluhlaziya izimpendulo zemibhalo yamahhala kuya kukwaziswa okujwayelekile kubo bonke ababambiqhaza abangu-4,216. Uhlelo lubonise ukuzwela okungama-87% kanye nokucaciswa okungu-84% kokuthola ukuphazamiseka okukhulu kokucindezeleka uma kuqhathaniswa nezingxoxo zomtholampilo ezihleliwe. Ikakhulukazi izici eziqagelayo zihlanganisa ukusetshenziswa kwesabizwana somuntu wokuqala, amagama omzwelo angemuhle, kanye nokuncipha kokuhlukahluka kolimi. Uma kuhlanganiswa nokuhlaziywa kwezwi le-acoustic (ukuthwebula izici ze-prosodic ezifana nokuncishiswa kwephimbo kanye nezinga lokukhuluma), ukunemba kokuxilonga kukhuphuke kwafinyelela ku-92%.
diagnosticSupport.p3: Ngokufanayo, ukuhlaziya okuzenzakalelayo kwamaphethini enkulumo nolimi kubonise ukusebenza kahle ekutholeni ukukhubazeka kwengqondo. Ocwaningweni lokuqinisekisa oluzoba khona olubandakanya abantu abadala abangama-382, uhlelo lwe-AI oluhlaziya ukuhlangana kwe-semantic, ubunkimbinkimbi be-syntactic, kanye nezici ze-acoustic phakathi nengxoxo emfushane ehleliwe yazuza ukunemba okungama-85% ekuhlonzeni ukukhubazeka okuncane kokuqonda, okuqhathaniswa nokuhlolwa okufushane kwe-neuropsychological kodwa kudinga isampula yenkulumo eyimizuzu emi-3 kuphela.
diagnosticSupport.p4: Ngokuphazamiseka kokukhathazeka, amasistimu e-multimodal ahlanganisa idatha ye-physiological (ukuhlukahluka kwesilinganiso senhliziyo, umsebenzi we-electrodermal) nezinyathelo zokuziphatha ziye zabonisa usizo oluthile. Uhlelo olugqokwayo oluqapha ama-autonomic biomarker ngesikhathi sokucindezeleka okujwayelekile luhlukanise kahle ukuphazamiseka kokukhathazeka okujwayelekile nokunemba okungu-83% kusampula yabahlanganyeli abangu-189, nokutholwa kokuphazamiseka kokuthuthumela kufinyelela ku-88% wokuzwela.
diagnosticSupport.p5: Izinhlelo zokusebenza zombono wekhompyutha zibonise isithembiso sezimo ezinezingxenye zokuziphatha ezibonakalayo. Uhlelo lokufunda olujulile oluhlaziya isimo sobuso namaphethini okunyakaza phakathi nezingxoxo zomtholampilo luthombe ukuphazamiseka kwe-autism spectrum ngokunemba okungama-86% ezinganeni ezineminyaka engu-3-6 ubudala, okungase kunike amandla ukuhlolwa kwangaphambi kwesikhathi kuzilungiselelo zokunakekelwa okuyisisekelo. Ngokufanayo, ukuhlaziya okurekhodiwe kwevidiyo okuvela ekuhloleni okuhleliwe kubonise ukunemba okungama-82% ekutholeni ukuphazamiseka kwengqondo okuguquguqukayo okusekelwe kumehluko ocashile wokusebenza kwezimoto kanye nokuvezwa kobuso phakathi nezigaba ze-manic ne-depressive.
diagnosticSupport.p6: Izindlela ze-Digital phenotyping, ukuhlaziya idatha ye-smartphone yokwenziwa, kubonakale kubalulekile ekuqaphelweni kwesimo. I-entropy yendawo (ukuhlukahluka kwamaphethini okunyakaza), ubude besikhathi sokulala, kanye nemvamisa yokuxhumana kubonise ukuhlobana okuphezulu (r=0.71-0.84) nezikali ezijwayelekile zokulinganisa ukucindezeleka, okuvumela ukuhlola okuqhubekayo phakathi kokuvakasha komtholampilo.
diagnosticSupport.p7: Okubalulekile, umsebenzi wakamuva ugxile ekubhekaneni nokuchema kwe-algorithmic kanye nokuqinisekisa ukusebenza ngokulinganayo kubantu abahlukahlukene. Ucwaningo lokuqinisekisa olukhulu lwe-algorithm yokuhlola ukucindezeleka kubo bonke ababambiqhaza abangu-8,200 abavela ezizindeni ezihlukahlukene zobuhlanga nezenhlalo nezomnotho lubonise ukucaciswa okuphansi ekuqaleni (73% vs. 89%) kubahlanganyeli abamnyama uma kuqhathaniswa nabahlanganyeli abamhlophe. Ngemva kokulungiswa kabusha kwemodeli ngesethi yokuqeqeshwa ehlukahlukene kanye namazinga okubhekisela alungisiwe ngokwesiko, ukungafani kokusebenza kwehliswe kakhulu, okucaciswe kuthuthukiswa kwafinyelela ku-85% kuwo wonke amaqembu abantu.
diagnosticSupport.p8: Naphezu kwalezi ntuthuko, izinselele zisekhona ezinhlelweni zokuxilonga. Amasistimu amaningi aye aqinisekiswa ngokuyinhloko kuzilungiselelo zocwaningo ezilawulwayo kunezindawo ezihlukahlukene zemitholampilo. Ngaphezu kwalokho, abaningi baye bagxila ekuhlukaniseni okumbambili (ukuba khona/ukungabikho kwesimo) esikhundleni sendlela yobukhulu ethandwa kakhulu emisebenzini yesimanje yengqondo. Imizamo yokubhekana nale mikhawulo ihlanganisa ukuthuthukiswa kwamamodeli okuxilonga ahlola ubukhulu bezimpawu kuyo yonke imingcele evamile yokuxilonga, okubonisa kangcono iqiniso eliyinkimbinkimbi lokucindezeleka kwengqondo.

therapeuticApplications.title: I-AI ku-Therapeutic Applications
therapeuticApplications.text: Ukungenelela kokwelapha okusekelwe ku-AI kwezempilo yengqondo kuvele ezinhlelweni ezilula ezisekelwe emithethweni...
therapeuticApplications.p1: Ukungenelela kokwelapha okusekelwe ku-AI kwempilo yengqondo kuye kwavela ezinhlelweni ezilula ezisekelwe emithethweni kuya kuma-ejenti ezingxoxo ayinkimbinkimbi akwazi ukuletha izimiso zokwelapha ezisekelwe ebufakazini. Lezi zinhlelo zokusebenza zisebenzisa i-spectrum kusuka ekwelapheni okuzenzakalelayo kwedijithali kuya ekwelapheni kwabantu oku-AI-augmented.
therapeuticApplications.p2: Izinhlelo ze-AI zezingxoxo ezisebenzisa imigomo ye-cognitive behaviour therapy (CBT) zibe nokuhlolwa okuqinile. Ocwaningweni oluyingqopha-mlando olulawulwa ngokungahleliwe olushicilelwe ku-Lancet Digital Health (2022), ababambiqhaza abayi-1,032 abanokucindezeleka okumaphakathi babelwa ohlelweni lwe-CBT olulethiwe nge-AI noma ukwelashwa njengokujwayelekile. Uhlelo lwe-AI, olubandakanya abasebenzisi ezingxoxweni ezisekelwe emibhalweni zansuku zonke zisebenzisa amasu ayinhloko e-CBT, lubonise ukuncipha okuphawulekayo kwezibalo zezibalo zokucindezeleka ze-PHQ-9 emavikini angu-12 uma kuqhathaniswa neqembu lokulawula (umehluko omkhulu -2.85 amaphuzu, 95% CI -4.07 kuya -1.63, p<0.001). Imiphumela yokwelashwa yagcinwa ekulandeleni kwezinyanga ezingu-6. Ngokuphawulekayo, amazinga okubambelela ohlelweni lwe-AI (ama-68% agcwalisa iphrothokholi egcwele) adlule amanani ajwayelekile okungenelela kwedijithali okuziqondisayo (imvamisa engu-25-30%), okuphakamisa ukuxhumana okuthuthukisiwe kwengxoxo.
therapeuticApplications.p3: Ngezinkinga zokukhathazeka, i-ejenti yengxoxo efanayo esebenzisa izimiso zokwelapha ukuchayeka ibonise ukusebenza kahle kokuphazamiseka kokukhathazeka okujwayelekile esivivinyweni sabahlanganyeli abangama-688. Uhlelo, oluqondise abasebenzisi ngezigaba zokudalulwa komuntu siqu ezinobunzima obuqhubekayo, lizuze ukwehla okukhulu ngo-25% kuzikolo ze-GAD-7 uma kuqhathaniswa nezilawuli zohlu lokulinda, ngemiphumela eqhathaniswa neqembu eliholwa ngubelaphi le-CBT ekuhlolweni kwangemuva kokwelashwa. Ukuhlaziywa kokuphumelela kwezindleko kubonise ukungenelela kwe-AI kubiza cishe ingxenye eyodwa kwezinhlanu zokwelashwa okufanayo okulethwa umuntu kuyilapho iletha izinzuzo zomtholampilo ezifanayo ezimweni ezithambile kuya kwezilingene.
therapeuticApplications.p4: Ngaphandle kokuphazamiseka kwemizwa nokukhathazeka, abelapha nge-AI bakhombise isithembiso sezimo ezihlanganisa ukuqwasha, ukuphazamiseka kwengcindezi yangemva kokuhlukumezeka, kanye nokuphazamiseka kokusebenzisa izidakamizwa. Uhlelo lokufunda oluqinisayo lwenkinga yokusetshenziswa kotshwala, olulethe imiyalezo ekhuthazayo yomuntu siqu ngokusekelwe kuzimo ezitholiwe zobungozi, lehlise izinsuku zokuphuza ezibikwayo ngo-34% uma kuqhathaniswa nokuqukethwe kwezemfundo okumile esivivinyweni sezinyanga ezi-3 esibandakanya ababambiqhaza abangama-352. Ikhono lesistimu lokuhlonza isikhathi sokungenela esilungile esisuselwe kudatha yokuqapha engenzi lutho (isb., idatha yendawo ebonisa ukuba seduze kwezindawo zokuphuza njalo) libonakale liqhuba ukusebenza kahle kwalo okuphezulu.
therapeuticApplications.p5: Ukwengezwa kwe-AI kokwelashwa kwabantu nakho kubonise ukubaluleka. Isistimu yokuqeqesha yokwelapha eyahlaziya imibhalo yeseshini ukuze inikeze abelaphi ngempendulo yokubambelela kanye nesiphakamiso esikhuthaza ukwethembeka kwephrothokholi ye-CBT okuthuthukisiwe ngo-32% futhi yahlotshaniswa nokuncipha okukhulu kwezimpawu (usayizi womphumela d=0.41) uma kuqhathaniswa nokwelashwa okungaguquki esivivinyweni esingahleliwe. Abelaphi babike ukuthi impendulo ye-AI isize ukugcina ukugxila kumasu asekelwe ebufakazini nokukhomba amathuba okungenelela okuthile okungenzeka ukuthi akuphuthelwe.

patientMonitoring.title: I-AI Ekuqapheni Isiguli Nokuvimbela Ukuphindeka Kabusha
patientMonitoring.text: Izinhlelo zokusebenza eziqhubekayo zokuqapha zimelela isizinda esithembisayo se-AI empilweni yengqondo...
patientMonitoring.p1: Izicelo eziqhubekayo zokuqapha zimelela isizinda esithembisayo se-AI empilweni yengqondo, okuvumela ukutholwa kwezinguquko zezimpawu phakathi kokuvakasha komtholampilo kanye nokungenelela okungaba khona kusenesikhathi. Lawa masistimu ngokuvamile asebenzisa izinzwa ze-smartphone, amadivayisi agqokekayo, nokusebenzisana komsebenzisi ukuze akhe ama-biomarker edijithali esimo sengqondo.
patientMonitoring.p2: Ngokugula kwengqondo okubi kakhulu, okuhlanganisa i-schizophrenia ne-bipolar, ukutholwa kwezimpawu eziyisixwayiso kusenesikhathi kubonise usizo olubalulekile lomtholampilo. Ocwaningweni oluzoba yizinyanga eziyi-12 lwabantu abangama-304 abane-schizophrenia, uhlelo lokuqapha olususelwa ku-smartphone oluhlaziya amaphethini enkulumo, ukulala, ukuhamba, nokuxhumana nomphakathi kuthole ukuthi i-89% yokubuyela emuva kwengqondo ngokwesilinganiso sezinsuku eziyi-7.4 ngaphambi kokuthi ukuwohloka komtholampilo kubonakale ngesikhathi sokunakekelwa okujwayelekile. Lapho ihlanganiswe nephrothokholi yokusabela komtholampilo, uhlelo lwehlise izilinganiso zokulaliswa esibhedlela ngo-28% uma kuqhathaniswa nokwelashwa njengokujwayelekile, okuphakamisa inzuzo enkulu kuzo zombili iziguli nezinhlelo zokunakekelwa kwezempilo.
patientMonitoring.p3: Izindlela ezifanayo ziye zabonisa ukusebenza kahle kwe-bipolar disorder. Isistimu ye-multimodal ehlaziya amaphethini okuthayipha, ukuzwakala kwezwi, ubude besikhathi sokulala, namazinga omsebenzi akhombe ukuqala kwesiqephu se-manic ne-depressive ngokunemba okungama-82% no-77% ngokulandelana, okuhlinzeka ngokwesilinganiso sesexwayiso sezinsuku ezi-4-6 ngaphambi kokuba kweqe imibundu yomtholampilo. Lapho isetshenziswa ngohlelo oludidiyelwe lwezaziso zomtholampilo esivivinyweni esingahleliwe sabahlanganyeli be-397, isistimu yokuqapha yayihlotshaniswa nobude besiqephu esifushane kanye nokuqina kwezimpawu ezincishisiwe uma kuqhathaniswa nokunakekelwa okujwayelekile.
patientMonitoring.p4: Ngokuqapha ukucindezeleka, amasistimu ahlaziya ukuziphatha kwedijithali abonise ukuhlobana okuqinile nezinyathelo zezimpawu zomtholampilo. Uhlelo lokusebenza lwenzwa oluqhubekayo oluqoqa idatha kumaphethini okusetshenziswa kwe-smartphone, umsebenzi womzimba, nokuziphatha komphakathi kubonise ukuhlobana okungu-0.82 nezikolo ze-PHQ-9 ocwaningweni lwezinyanga eziyisi-6 lwabahlanganyeli abangu-211 abanokucindezeleka okuphindaphindiwe. Amamodeli okufunda omshini aqeqeshelwe lezi zici zokuziphatha abikezele izinkomba zezimpawu ngokunemba okwanele ukuze ahlukanise ukuxazulula nokucindezeleka okuba kubi kakhulu kuma-76% ezimo, okungenzeka kunikeze amandla ukungenelela okufika ngesikhathi.
patientMonitoring.p5: Izinhlelo zokusebenza zokuqapha ukuphazamiseka kokudla zisebenzise izithombe zokudla ngokuhlaziywa kombono wekhompyutha eduze kwedatha yokuziphatha ukulandelela izimpawu nokuziphatha okuyingozi kakhulu. Ocwaningweni lokuhlola lwabantu abangu-157 abane-bulimia nervosa, uhlelo lwe-AI oluhlaziya okuqukethwe kokudla, amaphethini okudla, nezinkomba zokuziphatha ezinxephezelayo kukhombe ngokunembile u-83% wezenzakalo zokubuyela emuva ngokusekelwe kuma-biomarker edijithali kuphela, uma kuqhathaniswa nezinyathelo zokuzibika. Ukuhlanganiswa nokungenelela okuguquguqukayo okufika ngesikhathi kubonise ubufakazi bokuqala bokunciphisa iziqephu ze-binge-purge ngokunikeza ukusekelwa ezindaweni zezinqumo ezibalulekile.
patientMonitoring.p6: Kuzo zonke lezi zinhlelo zokusebenza, ukuzibandakanya komsebenzisi nobumfihlo kube yizinselelo eziyinhloko. Ucwaningo olusebenzisa ukwabelana ngedatha okulawulwa umsebenzisi, izincazelo ze-algorithm esobala, nokuboniswa kwenzuzo okucacile kuzuze izilinganiso eziphakeme kakhulu zokubandakanya, kufika ku-71% wabahlanganyeli abaqhubeka nokusebenzisa okuvamile izinyanga ezingu-6+. Ngokuphawulekayo, ukukhathazeka mayelana nobumfihlo kubonakala kuncishiswa lapho abasebenzisi bebona izinzuzo ezingokoqobo zezempilo futhi begcina ukulawula ukusetshenziswa kwedatha.

discussion.title: Ingxoxo
discussion.text:
Ukubuyekezwa kwethu kobufakazi bamanje kukhombisa ukuthi izinhlelo zokusebenza ze-AI empilweni yengqondo ziye zathuthuka zisuka emathubeni asezingqondweni zaya kumathuluzi aqinisekiswe ngokomtholampilo anemithelela elinganisekayo ekunembeni kokuhlola, ukulethwa kokwelashwa, kanye nokuqapha isimo. Izindikimba ezimbalwa ezibalulekile zivela kokutholwe yiqoqo.

Okokuqala, izindlela ze-multimodal zihlala zidlula amasistimu emodi eyodwa kuzo zonke izinhlelo zokusebenza. Ukuhlanganiswa kokuhlaziywa kolimi, ukuqapha ukuziphatha, amasignali okuphila, nolwazi lwesimo kudala isithombe esibanzi kakhulu sesimo sengqondo kunanoma yisiphi isilinganiso somuntu ngamunye. Lokhu kubonisa isimo esiyinkimbinkimbi, esinezimo eziningi zezimo zempilo yengqondo, ezibonakala kuzo zonke izizinda zengqondo, imizwa, ukuziphatha, neyokuphila. Ukuthuthukiswa kwesikhathi esizayo kufanele kuqhubeke kugcizelela ukuhlanganiswa kwemithombo yedatha ehambisanayo ngaphakathi kwezinhlaka zokuhlola ezihambisanayo.

Okwesibili, ubufakazi busekela imodeli eyingxube lapho i-AI ikhulisa khona esikhundleni sokwelashwa kwabantu. Isikhundla esiphumelele kakhulu sokuqaliswa kwe-AI njengesiphindaphinda samandla sobuchwepheshe bomtholampilo-ukunweba ukufinyelela, ukuthuthukisa ukusebenza kahle, ukunika amandla ukuhlola okuqhubekayo, kanye nokweseka umkhuba osekelwe ebufakazini. Umfelandawonye wezokwelapha phakathi kwesiguli nomhlinzeki uhlala uyisisekelo ekunakekelweni kwengqondo okusebenzayo, futhi ubuchwepheshe bubonakala busebenza kahle kakhulu lapho buthuthukiswa kunokuzama ukumiselela lobu budlelwano.

Okwesithathu, ukwenza kube ngokwakho kuvela njengesici esibalulekile ekusebenzeni kahle. Izimo zempilo yengqondo zibonisa ukuhlukahluka okukhulu kwesethulo, ukuqhubeka, kanye nokusabela kokwelashwa. Izinhlelo ze-AI ezikwazi ukuzivumelanisa namaphrofayili ezimpawu zomuntu ngamunye, izintandokazi zomuntu siqu, namaphethini okuphendula abonise imiphumela ephakeme kakhulu uma kuqhathaniswa nezindlela zokulinganisa usayizi owodwa. Lokhu kuhambisana nomnyakazo obanzi oya kudokotela wengqondo onembayo, lapho ukungenelela kwakhelwa amaphrofayili e-biopsychosocial ngamanye.

Naphezu kwalezi ntuthuko ezithembisayo, izinselele ezibalulekile zisekhona ekuhumusheni intuthuko yocwaningo ibe yimisebenzi yomtholampilo. Imikhawulo eyinhloko ihlanganisa:

Ukuchema kwe-algorithmic kanye nokukhathazeka okujwayelekile: Amasistimu amaningi athuthukisiwe futhi aqinisekiswa kubantu abacishe babe yisimo esifanayo, kuphakamisa imibuzo mayelana nokusebenza kuwo wonke amaqembu abantu abahlukahlukene. Ubufakazi bokuqala buphakamisa ukuthi amanye ama-algorithms asebenza ngendlela ehlukile kuzo zonke izimo zamasiko, ubulili, nezizinda zobuhlanga/ubuhlanga. Nakuba umsebenzi wakamuva usuqalile ukubhekana nalokhu kuhlukana ngokusebenzisa idatha yokuqeqesha emele ngokwengeziwe kanye namazinga okubhekisela anolwazi ngamasiko, ukuqinisekisa ukusebenza ngokulinganayo kuseyinselele eqhubekayo.

Ubufakazi besikhathi eside obunomkhawulo: Nakuba izifundo zesikhathi esifushane zibonisa imiphumela ethembisayo, kukhona ukushoda kwedatha yokulandelela yesikhathi eside ekuzibandakanyeni okuqhubekayo, imiphumela yokwelashwa ehlala isikhathi eside, kanye nemiphumela engahlosiwe engaba khona yokungenelela kwe-AI. Imvelo eguqukayo ngokushesha yobuchwepheshe be-AI idlula umugqa wesikhathi wendabuko wocwaningo lwesikhathi eside lomtholampilo, kudala igebe lobufakazi obuqhubekayo.

Izinselele zokuhlanganisa: Izithiyo zobuchwepheshe, ukuhamba komsebenzi, kanye nezamasiko zenza kube nzima ukuhlanganiswa kwamathuluzi e-AI ezinhlelweni ezikhona zomtholampilo. Ukuqaliswa okuphumelelayo kudinga ukunakwa kokuhamba komsebenzi womtholampilo, ukuhlanganiswa namarekhodi ezempilo ka-elekthronikhi, izindima ezicacile nezibopho, izinhlaka zezikweletu, namamodeli wembuyiselo. Ukuthuthuka kobuchwepheshe okuphoqa kakhulu kungase kuhluleke ukubona amandla azo ngaphandle kokunaka ngokucophelela lezi zici zokuqalisa.

Ukucatshangelwa kobumfihlo nokuvikeleka: Idatha yezempilo yengqondo iphakathi kolwazi lomuntu siqu olubucayi kakhulu. Nakuba izindlela zobuchwepheshe ezifana nokufunda okuhlanganyelwe kanye nobumfihlo obuhlukile busiza ukubhekana nalokhu kukhathazeka, izinhlaka zokuphatha eziphelele zokuphatha idatha okunesibopho kwezempilo yengqondo i-AI zihlala zingathuthukisiwe. Ukulinganisa izinzuzo zezindlela eziqhutshwa idatha nokuvikelwa kobumfihlo okuqinile kumelela inselele eqhubekayo.

Ukungaqiniseki ngokomthetho: Indawo yokulawula ye-AI empilweni yengqondo isathuthuka. Izinhlaka zamanje ezidizayinelwe izisetshenziswa zezokwelapha zendabuko zingase zingaqondi ngokwanele izici ezihlukile zezinhlelo ze-AI eziguqukayo eziqhubeka nokufunda lapho zisetshenziswa. Ukuthuthukisa izindinganiso ezifanele zokuqinisekisa, izidingo zokuqapha, kanye nokubuyekeza izimiso zezinhlelo zokufunda kuzobaluleka ekwenziweni okusha okunomthwalo wemfanelo.

Lezi zinselele noma kunjalo, ubufakazi busekela intuthuko eqhubekayo kanye nokuqaliswa ngokuqapha kwezinhlelo zokusebenza ze-AI ezibonisa inzuzo yomtholampilo, izinyathelo zokuphepha ezifanele, nokunaka ukucatshangelwa kwezimiso zokuziphatha. Amandla okwandisa ukufinyelela ekunakekelweni ngokwengqondo—ikakhulukazi kubantu abanganakiwe ababhekene nokushoda kwabahlinzeki—anikeza isizathu esinamandla sokusungula izinto ezintsha eziqhubekayo kulo mkhakha.

conclusion.title: Isiphetho
conclusion.text:
Izicelo zobuhlakani bokwenziwa empilweni yengqondo zithuthuke kakhulu kule minyaka eyishumi edlule, zisuka emiqondweni yetiyetha zaya kumathuluzi aqinisekisiwe ngokomtholampilo akhombisa ukusebenza kahle kulo lonke usizo lokuxilonga, ukulethwa kokwelashwa, ukuqapha kwesiguli, nokuhlaziya okubikezelayo. Ubufakazi obubuyekezwe kuleli phepha bubonisa ukuthi lobu buchwepheshe bunamandla angempela okubhekana nezinselele ezibucayi ekunakekelweni kwengqondo, okuhlanganisa ukulinganiselwa kokufinyelela, ukuvinjelwa kwezinsiza, kanye nesidingo sezindlela eziqhubekayo neziqondene nomuntu siqu zokuhlola nokungenelela.

Izimiso ezimbalwa ezibalulekile kufanele ziqondise ukuthuthukiswa nokusetshenziswa kwesikhathi esizayo. Okokuqala, i-AI kufanele ikhulise futhi yandise ubuchwepheshe bomtholampilo bomuntu kunokuzama ukufaka esikhundleni sobudlelwano obubalulekile bokwelapha phakathi komhlinzeki nesiguli. Okwesibili, izindlela ze-multimodal ezihlanganisa imithombo yedatha ehlukahlukene zinikeza isithombe esiphelele nesinembile sesimo sempilo yengqondo. Okwesithathu, amandla okwenza kube ngokwakho avumelana nezidingo zomuntu ngamunye, izintandokazi, namaphethini okuphendula abalulekile ekuzuzeni imiphumela emihle. Okwesine, ukunaka ngokucophelela ukulunga kwe-algorithm, ukuqinisekiswa okusobala phakathi kwabantu abahlukahlukene, nokuqapha okuqhubekayo kokuchema okungaba khona kubalulekile ukuze kusetshenziswe ngokulinganayo.

Nakuba izinselele ezibalulekile zisekhona—okuhlanganisa ukuhlanganiswa ekugelezeni komsebenzi komtholampilo, ukuvikelwa kobumfihlo, izinhlaka zokulawula, nokuthuthukiswa kobufakazi besikhathi eside—izinzuzo ezingaba khona ziqinisekisa ukuqhubeka kocwaningo kanye nokuqaliswa komtholampilo ngokuqapha kwamasistimu aqinisekiswe kahle. Igebe lokwelashwa kwezempilo yengqondo elithinta izigidi emhlabeni wonke lifuna izindlela ezintsha ezinganweba ukufinyelela kokunakekelwa okusekelwe ebufakazini.

Sibheke phambili, silindele izikhombisi-ndlela ezimbalwa ezithembisayo zenkambu. Ukuhlanganiswa kwedatha ye-genomic nenye yebhayoloji enezinyathelo zokuziphatha nezengqondo kungase kunikeze ukucaciswa okunembe kakhudlwana kwamaphrofayili engozi ngayinye kanye nezibikezelo zokusabela kokwelashwa. Izindlela zokufunda ezihlanganisiwe ezivumela ukuthuthukiswa kwemodeli kuzo zonke izikhungo ngaphandle kokuhlanganisa idatha ebucayi zingabhekana nokukhathazeka kobumfihlo kuyilapho kuvumela amasethi okuqeqesha ahlukahlukene futhi amele. Amamodeli wokusebenzisana wamanoveli womuntu ne-AI akhulisa amandla afanele abahlengikazi kanye nobuhlakani bokwenziwa angase aveze imiphumela ephakeme uma kuqhathaniswa noyedwana.

Njengoba lobu buchwepheshe buqhubeka nokuvela, ukulondoloza umbono olinganiselayo kubalulekile—ukuvuma kokubili amandla amakhulu e-AI okuthuthukisa ukunakekelwa kwengqondo nokubaluleka okuyisisekelo kokuxhumana kwabantu, ukuhlakanipha komtholampilo, nezindlela ezigxile kumuntu. Ngokuthuthuka okucatshangelwayo, ukuqinisekiswa okuqinile, nokuqaliswa ngokucophelela, i-AI inamandla okuba ithuluzi elibalulekile ekubhekaneni nomthwalo womhlaba wonke wokugula ngengqondo kanye nokuthuthukisa umgomo wokwenza ukunakekelwa kwempilo yengqondo okuphumelelayo kufinyeleleke kubo bonke abakudingayo.

hero.title: I-VirtualMD.app
hero.subtitle: Vula amandla akho ezempilo nge-VirtualMD.app. Xhumana nabaqondisi be-AI abaqeqeshwe ku-Western Wellness, Traditional Chinese Wellness, nobunye ubuciko bokuphila kahle—konke engxoxweni eyodwa. Thola imininingwane yomuntu siqu 24/7 futhi ulawule impilo yakho. Lokhu ukunakekelwa kwezempilo, kucatshangelwe kabusha.

whyUs.title: Kungani Khetha i-VirtualMD.app Yohambo Lwakho Lwezempilo?

personalTeam.title: Ithimba Lakho Siqu
personalTeam.text: Khetha ithimba lakho labeluleki bezempilo be-AI. Thola imininingwane evela ku-Western Wellness, I-Traditional Chinese Wellness, kanye nobungcweti bokuphila kahle obuhambisanayo.

aiNavigator.title: I-AI-Powered Personal Navigator yakho
aiNavigator.text: Itilosi lakho lezempilo le-AI likuholela emibonweni nempilo efanele ebaluleke kakhulu, ehumusha imininingwane evela kubacebisi bethu abakhethekile be-AI ibe izeluleko ongasebenziseka.

empoweringChoices.title: Ukunika amandla Izinketho Zezempilo
empoweringChoices.text: Thola imibono ecacile, esebenzisekayo, ekunika amandla okwenza izinqumo ezinolwazi mayelana nempilo yakho.

easyToUse.title: Kulula Ukuyisebenzisa
easyToUse.text: Inkundla yethu yakhelwe ukusebenzisana okunembile. Xhumana nemihlahlandlela ye-AI futhi uhlole izindlela zokuphila kahle ngaphandle kobunzima.

advancedTechnology.title: Revolutionary Advanced Technology
advancedTechnology.text: Zizwa isoftware yethu esezingeni eliphezulu, eklanyelwe ukukhulisa ukusebenzisana phakathi kwelukuluku lomuntu kanye nemininingwane yokuphila kahle eqhutshwa yi-AI.

dynamicEnsemble.title: I-Dynamic AI Ensemble:
dynamicEnsemble.text: I-AI yethu yokuhlela ihlanganisa ngokukhalipha ukuqonda okuvela enhlokweni ehlukahlukene yemihlahlandlela yokuphila kahle ye-AI—ehlanganisa Impilo YaseNtshonalanga, Impilo Yendabuko YamaShayina, nokunye—ukuze kubhekwane nemibuzo yakho ethile ngesikhathi sangempela.

holisticUnderstanding.title: Ukuqonda Okuphelele:
holisticUnderstanding.text: I-AI yethu ihumusha okokufaka okuhlukahlukene—umbhalo, noma izithombe zenqubekelaphambili yakho yokufaneleka, noma okufakwe kwijenali yezempilo—ukuze uthole imibono ebanzi, enothe ngokomongo yokuphila kahle.

rapidAccess.title: Ukufinyelela Ngokushesha Kumihlahlandlela ye-AI:
rapidAccess.text: Xhuma ngokushesha ngamakhulu emihlahlandlela yezempilo ye-AI ekhethekile enempendulo yomzuzwana omncane.

reliableInteractions.title: Ukusebenzisana Okuthembekile:
reliableInteractions.text: Izivikelo zokuphepha ezizenzakalelayo ziqinisekisa ukuzizwisa okushelelayo, okungaphazamiseki, nanoma umhlahlandlela we-AI udinga isikhashana ukuze ulinganise kabusha.

insightfulLogs.title: Amalogi wokusebenzelana ahlakaniphile:
insightfulLogs.text: Ukusebenzisana kweseshini kufakwe ukuze kusekelwe ukuthuthukiswa okuqhubekayo nokuthuthukiswa kolwazi lwemihlahlandlela yethu ye-AI.

technology.title: I-Revolutionary Technology yethu
technology.description1: I-VirtualMD.app isebenzisa izindlela zokucula ezisezingeni eliphezulu. Uhlelo lwethu luqinisekisa ukuthi imibuzo yakho iyahlomula ekhorasini lemihlahlandlela ye-AI, ethatha olwazini lwezokwelapha lwaseNtshonalanga, izimiso Zempilo Yendabuko YamaShayina, isayensi yokudla okunempilo, amasu okucabanga, amasu okufaneleka, nokunye okwengeziwe, ukuze kunikeze umbono ophelele.
technology.description2: Injini yethu yokucabanga ethuthukisiwe ihlanganisa ulwazi oluvela kokufakwayo kwakho kombhalo, amalogi abonakalayo, nenye idatha yokuphila kahle, inikeza imininingwane ephelele izindlela ezivamile ezingakwazi ukuziphindaphinda.
technology.description3: Ngomtapo wolwazi obanzi, ofinyeleleka ngokushesha wemihlahlandlela yokuphila kahle ye-AI kanye nezivumelwano eziqinile zokusebenzisana, siqinisekisa ukusebenzelana okungaguquki, okusezingeni eliphezulu kunoma yisiphi isizinda.
technology.description4: Konke ukusebenzelana kufakwe ngokucophelela, kuthuthukisa ukubonakala futhi kunikeza ukuguquguquka okuqhubekayo kokusebenza ngempumelelo kwenkundla yethu nekhwalithi yokuqonda.

cta.title: Ulungele Ukuguqula Impilo Yakho?
cta.subtitle: Joyina uhlelo lokusebenza lwe-VirtualMD futhi uthole inkathi entsha yokufinyelela iseluleko esiphambili sezempilo. Thatha isinyathelo sokuqala sokukunika amandla, ulwazi, nodlame. Hlola imibono ye-AI eyahlukene kanye nesisekelo sethu solwazi oluphelele lwezempilo.

dermatologyaiWhitepaper.title: isikhungo
dermatologyaiWhitepaper.content2:

Ukukhethwa kwesethi yedatha yethula izinselele eziyingqayizivele: ukuhluka kokukhanya, ukuma, nekhwalithi yesithombe kungaba nomthelela omkhulu ekusebenzeni kwe-algorithmic. Amasistimu amaningi aqeqeshelwa ukuqoqwa kwezithombe ezibuyela emuva ezivela emitholampilo yesikhumba, ezethula ukuchema okungaba khona kwe-spectrum - izithombe zingase zingameleli uhla olugcwele lwezethulo kuzilungiselelo zokunakekelwa okuyisisekelo. Izimo ezinezethulo ezicashile noma eziguquguqukayo, ezifana nokuqhuma kwezidakamizwa noma izimo ze-autoimmune zesigaba sangaphambi kwesikhathi, zibonise amanani aphansi okunemba (70-75%), okubonisa izindawo ezidinga ukuthuthukiswa okwengeziwe kwe-algorithm.

Ngokuphawulekayo, isistimu ye-multimodal ethuthukisiwe ye-Google ehlanganisa kokubili idatha yesithombe kanye nezimpawu ezibikwe ngesiguli ibonise ukuthuthuka okwengeziwe, ukufeza ukunemba okuphezulu koku-1 kwama-93% kuzo zonke izimo ezivamile ezingu-26. Ukuhlanganiswa kwedatha okungezona izithombe kubonakale kuwusizo ngokukhethekile ekuhlukaniseni izimo ezifanayo ngokubukeka nezimpawu ezihambisanayo ezihlukene, njengokuhlukanisa i-allergic contact dermatitis ne-erritant contact dermatitis ngokusekelwe ekubikweni kobunzima bokuluma kanye nomlando wokuchayeka.

Kwi-dermatology yezingane, lapho ukufinyelela kochwepheshe kunqunyelwe ngokukhethekile, amasistimu e-AI abonise isithembiso sezimo zesikhumba zengane ezivamile. Imodeli ekhethekile yezingane ithole ukunemba okungu-90.1% ezimeni ezihlanganisa i-atopic dermatitis, i-molluscum contagiosum, nezimpawu zokuzalwa ezivamile. Ngokuphawulekayo, uhlelo lubonise ukuzwela okungama-95.2% ekutholeni isifo somlomo wesandla phakathi nezikhathi zokuqubuka, iphakamisa ukusetshenziswa okungase kube khona ekuqashweni kwezempilo yomphakathi.
