pathologyaiWhitepaper.title: I-AI ku-Pathology: Ukuthuthukisa Ukunemba Kokuxilonga kanye nokusebenza kahle
pathologyaiWhitepaper.subtitle: Ukubuyekezwa okuphelele kwezicelo zobuhlakani bokwenziwa ku-anatomic kanye ne-clinical pathology

authors.names: Ron Rubin, PhD kanye noSandy Miles

abstract.title: Abstract
abstract.content: I-Artificial intelligence (AI) ivele njengobuchwepheshe obuguqulayo ku-pathology, ekhombisa amakhono okuthuthukisa ukunemba kokuxilonga, ukukhiqiza kabusha, kanye nokusebenza kahle kokuhamba komsebenzi. Leli phepha elimhlophe lihlola isimo samanje se-AI ku-pathology ngokusekelwe ezifundweni zakamuva zokuqinisekiswa komtholampilo, ukucaciswa kwemithetho, kanye nokusetshenziswa komhlaba wangempela. Sibuyekeza izinhlelo zokusebenza eziyinhloko ezihlanganisa ukutholwa komdlavuza, ukugreda, ukuhlola okubikezelwayo, nokuthuthukisa ukuhamba komsebenzi. Okutholakele okubalulekile kufaka phakathi amazinga okuzwela angama-95-99% okuthola umdlavuza kuzo zonke izinhlelo zezitho eziningi, ukuncipha okukhulu kokuhlukahluka kwe-interobserver, kanye namandla okunciphisa umsebenzi obalulekile. Nakuba ukusebenza kobuchwepheshe sekufinyelele emazingeni amukelekayo emitholampilo yezinhlelo zokusebenza eziningi, izinselele zokuqaliswa zihlala zibandakanya ukucatshangelwa kokulawula, ukuhlanganiswa kokuhamba komsebenzi, kanye nesidingo sokuqinisekisa okuqhubekayo. Sinikeza izincomo ezisekelwe ebufakazini zeminyango ye-pathology ecabangela ukutholwa kwe-AI, sigcizelela ukubaluleka kokukhetha ngokucophelela ukusetshenziswa kwecala, ukuqaliswa kwezigaba, nokuqapha ukusebenza okuqhubekayo. Ubufakazi bukhombisa ukuthi i-AI izokwengeza esikhundleni sokuthatha indawo yezazi zezifo, isebenze njengethuluzi elinamandla lokuthuthukisa amakhono okuxilonga kanye nokulawula izidingo ezikhulayo zomsebenzi.

introduction.title: Isingeniso
introduction.content:
Umkhakha we-pathology ubhekene nezinselelo ezingakaze zibonwe ngaphambili: ukwanda kwamacala, ubunzima obukhulayo bezinqubo zokuxilonga, ukushoda kwabasebenzi, kanye nengcindezi yezikhathi zokushintsha ngokushesha. Ngesikhathi esifanayo, ukuphila kahle kudinga ukuhlaziywa kwezicubu ezinemininingwane eyengeziwe, ukuhlolwa kwe-biomarker yobuningi, nokuhlanganiswa kokutholwe kwe-morphologic nedatha yamangqamuzana. Ngokumelene nalokhu kwangemuva, ubuhlakani bokwenziwa (AI) buvele njengesixazululo esingaba khona sokuthuthukisa umkhuba we-pathology.

Ngenkathi i-AI emfanekisweni wezokwelapha ithole ukunakwa okubalulekile, i-pathology iveza amathuba nezinselele eziyingqayizivele. Ngokungafani ne-radiology lapho i-AI ihlaziya khona izithombe ze-anatomy engaguquki, i-pathology AI kufanele ihumushe izigaba zezicubu ezincane ezimele izakhiwo eziyinkimbinkimbi ezinezinhlangothi ezintathu ezehliswe zibe amaslayidi anezinhlangothi ezimbili. Umthamo wedatha ophelele uyamangaza - isithombe esigcwele isilayidi singaqukatha izigidigidi zamaphikseli, esidinga izindlela eziyinkimbinkimbi zokuhlanganisa.

Leli phepha elimhlophe lihlinzeka ngokubuyekezwa okuphelele kwezicelo ze-AI ku-pathology, egxile kubuchwepheshe obuthole ukuqinisekiswa okuqinile komtholampilo. Sihlola isisekelo sobufakazi, sixoxe ngokucatshangelwa kokusetshenziswa, futhi sinikeze isiqondiso esisebenzayo seminyango ye-pathology ehlola ukutholwa kwe-AI. Ukuhlaziya kwethu kusekelwe ezifundweni ezibuyekezwe ontanga, izinqumo zokulawula, kanye nedatha yokusetshenziswa yangaphambi kwesikhathi yomhlaba wangempela.

methods.title: Izindlela/Ubuchwepheshe
methods.content:
Izinhlelo zesimanje ze-AI ye-pathology zisebenzisa izakhiwo zokufunda ezijulile, ikakhulukazi amanethiwekhi e-neural e-convolutional (CNNs), ukuhlaziya izithombe zamaslayidi aphelele afakwe kwidijithali ngokulungiswa okuphezulu (imvamisa okungu-20-40× ukukhuliswa). Lawa masistimu aqeqeshwa kudathasethi enkulu yezithombe ezilebulwe, ngokuvamile ezidinga izichasiselo zesazi sezifo ukuze kutholwe iqiniso eliyisisekelo. Kunezindlela ezimbili eziyinhloko ze-AI: ukufunda okugadiwe kusetshenziswa izichasiselo zeleveli yesifunda noma yesilayidi, nokufunda okungagadiwe kahle okudinga kuphela ukuxilonga kwezinga lesimo. Ukuqeqesha ngokuvamile kuhilela izinqubo zezigaba eziningi, kuqala ukuthola izifunda ezinentshisekelo kuzo ngokukhuliswa okuphansi, bese uhlukanisa lezi zifunda ngokukhuliswa okuphezulu ukuze kuhlonzwe izifo ezithile.

Amamethrikhi okusebenza angukhiye ahlanganisa ukuzwela (ingxenye yokuvuma kwangempela kukhonjwe kahle), ukucaciswa (ingxenye yezinto ezingezinhle ezikhonjwe kahle), indawo engaphansi kwejika lesici somamukeli (AUC), nezilinganiso zesivumelwano ezifana ne-Cohen's kappa. Ukuqinisekiswa komtholampilo kudinga ukuhlolwa kumasethi edatha azimele avela ezikhungweni eziningi ukuze kuqinisekiswe ukutholakala okujwayelekile kuzo zonke iziguli ezihlukene, izindlela zokulungiselela izicubu, kanye nemishini yokuskena.

digitalPathologyOverview.title: I-Digital Pathology Uhlolojikelele
digitalPathologyOverview.content:
I-Digital pathology ikhule kakhulu, kanti imakethe yomhlaba wonke kulindeleke ukuthi ifinyelele ku-$1.4 billion ngo-2027. Ukwamukelwa kwelabhorethri kukhule ngesivinini, ikakhulukazi ezikhungweni zezokwelapha nasemalabhorethri ayinkomba lapho izithiyo zokuqala zokulawula ziye zanqotshwa. Ngo-2017, i-FDA yasula lonke uhlelo lokuthwebula izithombe zamaslayidi ukuze kuxilongwe okuyinhloko (Philips IntelliSite Pathology Solution), kulandele ukucaciswa okwengeziwe okuhlanganisa i-Leica Aperio AT2 DX kanye ne-Aperio GT 450 DX. Lezi zinhlelo zakha ingqalasizinda yedijithali edingekayo ku-computational pathology kanye nezinhlelo zokusebenza ze-AI.

I-AI ku-pathology yaqala ngokusetshenziswa okugxilwe kuzimo ezilinganiselwe ze-histology kodwa iye yanda ukuze ihlanganise izinhlobo eziningi zezicubu nemisebenzi yokuxilonga. Izindlela zokubala ziye zavela ngokufanayo kusukela ekufundeni komshini okuvamile okunezici ezinjiniyela kuya ekufundeni okujulile okusuka ekupheleni okukwazi ukukhipha izici ngokuqondile kudatha yephikseli. Amasethi edatha okuqeqesha akhule esuka kumakhulu kuya kumakhulu ezinkulungwane zamaslayidi, okuvumela ukwenziwa okuvamile okuqinile kuzo zonke izihlwele zeziguli nezimo zokuskena.

cancerDetection.title: Ukuthola Umdlavuza
cancerDetection.content:
Ku-oncologic pathology, izinhlelo ze-AI zibonise ukunemba okuphawulekayo ekutholeni izifo ezihlukahlukene. Ngomdlavuza wendlala yesinye, uPantanowitz et al. ihlole i-algorithm ye-AI (i-Paige Prostate) ocwaningweni lokuqinisekisa lwezindawo eziningi olubandakanya amaslayidi angu-549 ezigulini eziyi-100. I-AI ikhombise ukuzwela okungama-98.8% kanye nokucaciswa okungu-97.3% kokuhlonza umdlavuza, iphumelela ukwedlula odokotela bezifo ezijwayelekile ikakhulukazi ezimeni eziyinselele (Lancet Digital Health, 2020). Ngokufanayo, uCampanella et al. uthuthukise indlela yokufunda engagadiwe kahle eqeqeshwe kumaslayidi e-prostate angaphezu kuka-15,000 athole i-AUC engu-0.98 yokutholwa komdlavuza (Imithi Yemvelo, 2019).

Ngomdlavuza webele, izinselelo ze-CAMELYON zinikeze ubufakazi obubalulekile bokusebenza kwe-AI ekutholeni ama-metastase kuma-lymph nodes. Ku-CAMELYON16, i-algorithm ehamba phambili izuze i-AUC engu-0.994, yeqa ukusebenza kodokotela bezifo abasebenza ngaphansi kwemikhawulo yesikhathi (AUC 0.810) (JAMA, 2017). Lezi zinhlelo zithola amangqamuzana omdlavuza okungenzeka aphuthelwe ngesikhathi sokubuyekezwa mathupha, ikakhulukazi ama-micrometastase namaseli wesimila angawodwa.
cancerDetection.content2:
Ngaphandle kwalezi zomdlavuza ezivamile, izinhlelo ze-AI zenzelwe ezinye izifo eziningi ezimbi. Ku-pathology yamaphaphu, ama-algorithms okufunda okujulile angakwazi ukuhlukanisa i-adenocarcinoma ku-squamous cell carcinoma ngokunemba okungama-97% futhi akhombe izinguquko zofuzo (isb., ukuguqulwa kwe-EGFR) ezicini ze-histomorphological (Umdlavuza Wemvelo, 2020). Ku-colorectal pathology, i-AI ingakwazi ukubona i-adenomas, ihlukanise i-histologic subtypes, futhi ikhombe isimo sokungaqini kahle kwe-microsatellite ngokuqondile kumaslayidi e-H&E anokuzwela okudlula u-95% (J Pathol, 2020).

Izinzuzo zokutholwa kwe-AI zidlulela ngale kokuzwela. Ucwaningo lubonisa ngokungaguquki ukuhluka okuncishisiwe kwe-interrobserver lapho ama-pathologist enosizo lwe-AI. Isibonelo, uSteiner et al. ibonise ukuthi usizo lwe-AI lukhuphule isivumelwano se-pathologists ngezinga lokubhekisela lisuka ku-93.3% laya ku-95.8% lokutholwa kwe-metastasis yomdlavuza webele (Am J Surg Pathol, 2018). Lokhu kuvumelana okwenyukayo kunemithelela ebalulekile ekuxilongeni amacala asemngceleni kanye nokulinganisa ukunakekelwa kuzo zonke izikhungo.

gradingClassification.title: Ukugreda kanye nokuhlukanisa
gradingClassification.content:
Ngaphandle kokutholwa komdlavuza kanambambili, amasistimu e-AI enze inqubekelaphambili ebalulekile emisebenzini eyinkimbinkimbi ehlanganisa ukuthayipha okuncane kanye nokugreda. Okuphawuleka kakhulu, ukugredwa kwe-Gleason okuzenzakalelayo komdlavuza wendlala yesinye kube yinto okugxilwe kuyo ocwaningweni olunzulu ngenxa yokuhlukahluka okwaziwayo kwe-interrobserver kulo maka obalulekile wokubikezela. Bulten et al. ithuthukise uhlelo lokufunda olujulile olunikeza amaphuzu anemininingwane e-Gleason nokusebenza okulingana nodokotela bezifo ze-urologic abanolwazi (i-kappa = 0.62 vs. 0.57) futhi besondela ezingeni lochwepheshe be-genitourinary (kappa = 0.73) (Lancet Oncology, 2020). Ngokufanayo, uStröm et al. ibike uhlelo lwe-AI olufinyelela esigabeni se-pathologist nge-AUC engu-0.98 yokuhlukanisa izifunda ezinomdlavuza kanye ne-AUC engu-0.85-0.93 yokuhlukanisa amabanga e-Gleason ahlukene (IEEE TMI, 2020).

Ku-renal pathology, amasistimu we-AI athuthukisiwe ukuze ahlukanise izinhlobo ezingaphansi ezihlukene ze-renal cell carcinoma ngokunemba > okungama-95% ezinhlotsheni ezine ezivame kakhulu (Nat Mach Intell, 2019). Kumaqhuqhuva egilo, i-AI ingakwazi ukuhlukanisa i-benigne nezici eziyingozi ezinokuzwela okungama-90-99% kuye ngohlobo oluthile lomdlavuza wegilo (JAMA Network Open, 2019). Lezi zinhlelo zokusebenza zidlulela ngale kwesigaba somdlavuza - i-AI ibonise isithembiso ekulinganiseni izifo ezivuvukalayo (isb., ukuqina kwesifo samathumbu), ukulinganisa ukungena kwamangqamuzana omzimba omzimba (ukuhlolwa kwe-tumor microenvironment), kanye nokulinganisa izici ze-morphologic ezibikezela impendulo yokwelashwa.

workflowOptimization.title: Ukuthuthukisa Ukugeleza Kwemisebenzi
workflowOptimization.content:
Ngaphandle kokunemba kokuxilonga, i-AI inikeza amandla abalulekile okwenziwa kahle kokuhamba komsebenzi we-pathology. Isithuthukisi esibalulekile sokuhamba komsebenzi ukuhlola kusengaphambili ukuze ubeke amacala kuqala futhi kuncishiswe isikhathi esichithwa kumasampuli ayingozi noma avamile. Ho et al. ibonise ukuthi ukuhlolwa kwangaphambili kwe-AI kwe-prostate biopsies kunganciphisa umsebenzi we-pathologist ngo-30-50% ngenkathi kugcinwa ukunemba kokuxilonga (Mod Pathol, 2021). Ngokufanayo, uDa Silva et al. ithole ukuthi ukuhlolwa kwangaphambili kwe-AI kwe-cytology yomlomo wesibeletho kunganciphisa ukubuyekezwa okwenziwa ngesandla kuze kufike ku-40% (J Am Soc Cytopathol, 2021).

Ekuhlolweni komthamo, amasistimu e-AI enza ngokuzenzakalelayo imisebenzi yezandla eyisicefe efana nokubala i-mitotic, isilinganiso se-tumor proportion scoring ye-PDL1, kanye nokulinganisa amabala e-immunohistochemical. Ngokushaya amagoli e-Ki-67, uMaeda et al. ibonise ukuthi uhlelo lwe-AI oluzenzakalelayo lwehlise isikhathi sokuhlola ngama-83% ngenkathi lugcina noma lweqa ukunemba kokubala okwenziwa ngesandla (i-Sci Rep, 2021). Lokhu okuzenzakalelayo kulinganisa izilinganiso ngokuvamile ezihlushwa ukuhlukahluka okubanzi kwe-interobserver.

Ukuze uthole ukwesekwa kwezinqumo zomtholampilo, amasistimu e-AI angahlonza amacala adinga ubuchwepheshe be-subspecialty noma izifundo ezengeziwe. U-Chen et al. ibonise ukuthi i-algorithm ye-AI ingahlola u-98% wamacala avamile kuyilapho ihlaba umkhosi kuphela u-2% wokubuyekezwa kodokotela bezifo eziphezulu, ngaphandle kokulahlekelwa ukunemba kokuxilonga (Nat Commun, 2022). Uma kuhlanganiswe nezinhlelo zolwazi zaselabhorethri, lezi zindlela zinganciphisa kakhulu izikhathi zokushintsha izimo ezivamile kuyilapho kuqinisekisa ukubuyekezwa okufanele kochwepheshe bamacala ayinselele.

discussion.title: Ingxoxo
discussion.content:
Ubufakazi obuqoqiwe bubonisa ukuthi i-AI ithuthuke isuka kumqondo wocwaningo yaya kubuchwepheshe bebanga lomtholampilo ku-pathology. Amamethrikhi okusebenza kuzo zonke izifundo eziningi abonisa ngokungaguquki ukuzwela nokucaciswa okudlula u-90% ezinhlelweni eziningi, ukuncintisana noma ukwedlula ukusebenza komuntu emisebenzini ethile. Nokho, ukucatshangelwa okuningana okubalulekile kuthinta ukuhunyushwa kanye nokuqaliswa kwalokhu okutholakele.

Ukubaluleka komtholampilo: I-AI ikhombisa amandla athile emisebenzini ehlanganisa ukubonwa kwephethini nokulinganisa. Ukuze kutholwe umdlavuza, ukuzwela kwe-AI kuvame ukudlula lokho kodokotela bezifo ezivamile, okungenzeka kunciphise amazinga okuxilongwa okugejiwe. Ekusetshenzisweni okulindelwe, i-Pantanowitz et al. ibike ukuthi i-AI ithole ama-foci amaningi omdlavuza ekuqaleni aphuthelwe yizazi zezifo, igqamisa inani lawo "njengombuyekezi wesibili" (Lancet Digital Health, 2020). Emisebenzini yokugreda, i-AI inikeza imiphumela engaguquki kakhulu kunodokotela bezifo ngabanye, inciphisa ukuhlukahluka okungathinta ukuphathwa kwesiguli.

Umthelela wokugeleza komsebenzi: Isikhathi se-pathologist siyisisetshenziswa esincipha ngokuya ngokuya, okwenza ukuhamba komsebenzi kube bucayi. Ucwaningo lukhombisa ukonga isikhathi okungu-30-60% kwemisebenzi eyahlukene uma usebenzisa usizo lwe-AI. Lokhu kuhumushela ezinzuzweni ezingokoqobo - umnyango we-pathology ocubungula izehlakalo eziyi-100 ze-prostate masonto onke ungonga amahora angu-15-30 we-pathologist, okuvumela ukugxila ezimeni eziyinkimbinkimbi ezidinga ubuchwepheshe bomuntu.

Ukuhlukahluka kwe-Iterobserver: Ukuthola okungaguquki kuzo zonke izifundo kunciphisa ukuhlukahluka lapho i-AI isiza odokotela bezifo. Ngebanga le-Gleason, isivumelwano se-interobserver ngokuvamile siyenyuka sisuka kumanani e-kappa angu-0.5-0.6 (isivumelwano esimaphakathi) siye ku-0.7-0.8 (isivumelwano esikhulu) ngosizo lwe-AI (Lancet Oncol, 2020). Lokhu kuvumelana okuthuthukisiwe kunemithelela ebalulekile yokumiswa kokwelashwa kuzo zonke izilungiselelo zokuzijwayeza ezihlukene.

Naphezu kwale miphumela ethembisayo, imikhawulo ebalulekile idinga ukucatshangelwa. Ukugcwaliseka kuhlale kuwukukhathazeka okuyinhloko - amasistimu e-AI aqeqeshwe kudatha evela ezikhungweni ezithile noma isibalo seziguli angase angasebenzi kahle ezilungiselelweni ezihlukene. Izinto zobuchwepheshe ezinjengokulungiselela amaslayidi, izimiso eziyisisekelo, nezici zesikena zingathonya ukusebenza kwe-AI. I-FDA izibonile lezi zinselelo, incoma ukuqinisekiswa kwezindawo eziningi zezinhlelo ze-AI ezifuna imvume yokulawula.

Ukuchema kwesethi yedatha kungenye indaba ebalulekile. Ama-algorithms amaningi aqeqeshwa kubantu baseNtshonalanga futhi angase angasebenzi kahle kwamanye amaqembu ezizwe anezethulo zezifo ezihlukene. Isibonelo, umdlavuza wendlala yesinye uvame ukuletha amaphethini e-morphological ahlukene emadodeni ase-Afrika aseMelika uma kuqhathaniswa namadoda aseCaucasia, okungenzeka kube nomthelela ekusebenzeni kwe-algorithm ye-AI uma ingamelwe ngokwanele kudatha yokuqeqeshwa.

Ukwengamela okusemthethweni kwe-pathology AI kuyaqhubeka nokuvela. I-FDA isule amadivaysi ambalwa e-AI e-pathology ngokusebenzisa izindlela ze-De Novo kanye ne-510(k), isungula isibonelo sokuqaliswa komtholampilo. Imvume ka-2021 ye-FDA ye-Paige Prostate imake ingqopha-mlando njengohlelo lokuqala lwe-AI lwe-pathology olugunyazwe ukusetshenziswa kokuxilonga okuyinhloko. Kodwa-ke, amasistimu amaningi asulwa njengama-algorithm "akhiyiwe" angakwazi ukufunda noma ukuzivumelanisa nezimo ngemva kokuthunyelwa, okudala izinselele zokugcina ukusebenza njengoba amaphethini wokuzijwayeza ashintsha.

Ukuhlanganiswa nokugeleza komsebenzi kwaselabhorethri okukhona kuveza izithiyo zokuqalisa ezingokoqobo. Ukwamukelwa kwe-Digital pathology, nakuba kukhula, kuhlala kungaphelele kulo lonke uhlelo lokunakekelwa kwezempilo. Izinhlelo ze-AI zidinga ukuhlanganiswa nezinhlelo zolwazi zaselabhorethri kanye nezinkundla ezikhona ze-digital pathology. Ukwengeza, izazi ze-pathology zidinga ukuqeqeshwa ukuze zifake ngempumelelo imiphumela ye-AI enqubweni yazo yokuxilonga, zitolika amaphuzu angenzeka kanye namamephu okushisa ngendlela efanele.

Njenganoma ibuphi ubuchwepheshe obusafufusa, idatha yokonga izindleko ihlala inomkhawulo. Ukuqaliswa kokuqala kudinga ukutshalwa kwezimali okubalulekile kungqalasizinda yedijithali, kodwa izinzuzo zesikhathi eside zingase zihlanganise amanani ancishisiwe amaphutha, izikhathi zokushintsha ngokushesha, kanye nokusetshenziswa kwezinsiza ngokuphumelelayo. Izindlela zokubuyisela imali yezinsizakalo ze-AI ezisizwa yi-pathology zisathuthuka, okudala ukungaqiniseki mayelana nokusimama kwezezimali kwalobu buchwepheshe.

conclusion.title: Isiphetho
conclusion.content:
I-Artificial Intelligence ine-pathology ethuthuke ngokuphawulekayo, enobufakazi obukhulayo bokuthi amasistimu e-AI angafinyelela ukusebenza kwezinga lochwepheshe emisebenzini ethile yokuxilonga. Ubufakazi obuqine kakhulu bukhona bokusetshenziswa kwe-oncologic pathology, ikakhulukazi umdlavuza wendlala yesinye kanye nomdlavuza wamabele, lapho izinhlelo ezisulwe yi-FDA zingene emisebenzini yomtholampilo. I-AI ibonisa amandla athile ekubhekaneni nezinselele ezaziwayo ku-pathology: yehlisa ukuhlukahluka kwe-interobserver, ithuthukisa ukutholwa kokutholwe okucashile, imise ukuhlolwa komthamo, futhi ithuthukise ukusebenza kahle kokuhamba komsebenzi.

Ushintsho olusuka ocwaningweni luye ekusetshenzisweni emtholampilo luya ngesivinini, lusekelwa uhlaka olukhulayo lokulawula nolwazi lwesikhungo. Kodwa-ke, ukuhlanganiswa okuphumelelayo kudinga ukunakwa kwezobuchwepheshe, ukuhamba komsebenzi, nokuqinisekisa. Ukuze uthole imiphumela emihle, i-AI kufanele isetshenziswe njengobuchwepheshe bokusiza isazi sezifo esikhundleni sohlelo lokuxilonga oluzimele lwezinhlelo eziningi zokusebenza. Ubambiswano lwe-pathologist-AI lusebenzisa amandla ahambisanayo ochwepheshe bomuntu namandla okuhlanganisa.

Izikhombisi-ndlela zesikhathi esizayo zifaka phakathi izinhlelo zokusebenza ezinwetshiwe ezinkampanini ezingavamile, ukuhlola okubikezelwayo kwe-biomarker, nokuhlanganiswa nedatha ye-genomic ne-molecular. Ukuqinisekiswa kwekhwalithi yesikhathi sangempela, ukuncishiswa kokungafani kokuxilonga, nokujwayela amaphethini wokuzijwayeza athuthukayo kumelela imigomo ebalulekile. Ubufakazi obubuyekeziwe busekela ukutshalwa kwezimali okuqhubekayo ezinhlelweni ze-AI ye-pathology ngokuqinisekiswa okuqinile kanye nokuqaliswa okucatshangelwayo. Ngokuthuthuka okufanele kwezobuchwepheshe, ukuqinisekiswa, kanye nokuhlanganiswa kokugeleza komsebenzi komtholampilo, i-AI inamandla okuthuthukisa kakhulu ikhwalithi nokusebenza kahle kokuxilongwa kwe-pathologic.

questions.replacementForDoctor: Ingabe i-VirtualMD.app ithatha indawo kadokotela wami?
questions.tryWithoutAccount: Ngingakwazi ukuzama i-VirtualMD.app ngaphandle kokudala i-akhawunti?
questions.uploadDocuments: Ngingakwazi ukulayisha izithombe zezokwelapha noma amadokhumenti?
questions.whatMakesDifferent: Yini eyenza i-VirtualMD ihluke kwamanye amapulatifomu ezempilo e-AI?

answers.whatIsVirtualMD: I-VirtualMD.app iyinkundla yokubonisana yokunakekelwa kwezempilo enikwe amandla nge-AI ehlinzeka ngesiqondiso somuntu siqu sezokwelapha ngengxoxo ye-AI ethuthukisiwe. Inkundla yethu ihlanganisa abantu abangaphezu kuka-60 bezokwelapha abakhethekile be-AI, ngayinye inobuchwepheshe obuhlukile ezindaweni ezahlukene zokunakekelwa kwezempilo.
answers.replacementForDoctor: Cha, i-VirtualMD.app ayithatheli indawo yokunakekelwa kwezokwelapha okuchwepheshile. Ukubonisana kwethu ne-AI kuklanyelwe ukuhlinzeka ngolwazi lwezempilo, imfundo, kanye neziqondiso zokuqala. Hlala uthintana nochwepheshe bezempilo abaqeqeshiwe ukuze uthole ukuxilongwa, ukwelashwa, kanye nezinqumo zezokwelapha.
answers.howItWorks: Ungaqala ingxoxo nomunye wabantu bethu abakhethekile be-AI ngokubakhetha kudeshibhodi. Umuntu ngamunye unolwazi oluthile (isb., ezenhliziyo, ezezingane, impilo yengqondo) futhi uzohlanganyela engxoxweni ukuze aqonde okukukhathazayo futhi akunikeze ulwazi olufanele nesiqondiso.
answers.healthInfoSecure: Yebo, sibheka ubumfihlo bedatha nokuvikeleka njengento ebaluleke kakhulu. Zonke izingxoxo zibethelwe, futhi sithobela imithetho yokuvikela idatha yokunakekelwa kwezempilo. Imininingwane yakho yezempilo ayilokothi yabiwe nabanye abantu ngaphandle kwemvume yakho ecacile. Bheka ikhasi lethu Lobumfihlo Bedatha ukuze uthole imininingwane eyengeziwe.
answers.tryWithoutAccount: Yebo! Sinikeza okuhlangenwe nakho kwezivakashi okukuvumela ukuthi uzame insizakalo yethu yokubonisana ye-AI ngaphandle kokudala i-akhawunti. Izikhathi zezihambeli zikhawulelwe emilayezweni engu-10 futhi zinikeza ukufinyelela kumuntu wethu ovamile wokubonisana nodokotela.
answers.supportedLanguages: I-VirtualMD.app isekela izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-30, okuhlanganisa isiNgisi, iSpanishi, isiFulentshi, isiJalimane, isiShayina, isiJapane, isi-Arabhu, isiHebheru, nezinye eziningi. Inkundla ithola ngokuzenzakalelayo okuncamelayo kolimi lwesiphequluli sakho bese ilungisa ngokufanele.
answers.uploadDocuments: Yebo, abasebenzisi ababhalisiwe bangalayisha izithombe zezokwelapha namadokhumenti ngesikhathi sokubonisana. I-AI yethu ingahlaziya futhi inikeze imininingwane ngezithombe ezihlukahlukene zezokwelapha ezihlanganisa ama-X ray, ama-MRIs, nemibiko yelebhu. Lesi sici sisiza ekunikezeni isiqondiso somongo nesinembile.
answers.aiAccuracy: Amamodeli ethu e-AI aqeqeshwe ezincwadini eziningi zezokwelapha futhi avuselelwa ngokuqhubekayo ngolwazi lwakamuva lwezokwelapha. Nakuba i-AI yethu inikeza ulwazi lwekhwalithi ephezulu olusekelwe ekuqondeni kwezokwelapha kwamanje, kufanele ngaso sonke isikhathi lusetshenziswe njengesisetshenziswa esingeziwe kanye nokunakekelwa kwezokwelapha okuchwepheshile.
answers.conversationHistory: Yebo, abasebenzisi ababhalisiwe bangafinyelela umlando wabo ophelele wengxoxo, okuhlanganisa izifinyezo, okulotshiwe, nanoma imaphi amadokhumenti okwabelwana ngawo. Lokhu kusiza ukugcina ukuqhubeka ohambweni lwakho lolwazi lwezempilo futhi kukuvumela ukuthi wabelane ngokubonisana okufanele nabahlinzeki bakho bezempilo.
answers.voiceSupport: Yebo, i-VirtualMD.app isekela kokubili umbhalo-kuya-inkulumo kanye nokusebenza kokukhuluma kuya kombhalo. Ungalalela izimpendulo ze-AI futhi ukhulume imibuzo yakho esikhundleni sokuthayipha, okwenza inkundla ifinyeleleke kalula futhi isebenziseke kalula.
answers.whatMakesDifferent: I-VirtualMD.app ihlanganisa abantu abangaphezu kuka-60 bezokwelapha abakhethekile be-AI, ngamunye unolwazi olujulile emikhakheni ethile yezokwelapha. Inkundla yethu iphinde inikeze ukwesekwa kolimi okuphelele, ukusebenzisana kwezwi, ukuhlaziya izithombe zezokwelapha, futhi igcine izindinganiso eziqinile zobumfihlo kuyilapho inikeza isixhumi esibonakalayo esinembile, esifinyelelekayo.
answers.cost: Sinikeza ama-subscription tiers ahlukahlukene ukuhlangabezana nezidingo ezahlukene. Abasebenzisi abayizihambeli bangazama isevisi mahhala ngezici ezikhawulelwe. Abasebenzisi ababhalisiwe bathola ukufinyelela kubo bonke abantu, izingxoxo ezingenamkhawulo, nezici ezithuthukile. Sicela uhlole ikhasi lethu lezintengo ngezinketho zamanje zokubhaliselwe.

Iyiphi ingxenye yempilo yakho nokudla ongathanda ukugxila kuyo?

founders.title: Inothi elivela kubasunguli
founders.paragraph1: Sakhe lolu hlelo lokusebenza ngethemba elilodwa: ukusiza ukwenza umhlaba ube indawo enempilo ngokunikeza ukufinyelela eziqondisweni ezithembekile zezokwelapha—ezixhaswe ubuchwepheshe obusanda kwenzeka. Kungumphumela wokubambisana phakathi kososayensi norabi, bobabili abathuthukisi asebenesikhathi eside abaqonda kokubili isithembiso nomsebenzi wale nkathi entsha ye-AI.
founders.paragraph2: Umgomo wethu uwukunikeza ukufinyelela kwamahhala nokugcwele kwenkundla kubasebenzisi bethu bokuqala abayisigidi. Sikholelwa ukuthi impilo kufanele itholakale yibo bonke abantu—hhayi kuphela labo abakwaziyo ukuyikhokhela. Njengoba inkundla ikhula, singase sethule izinkokhelo zezici ezithile ze-premium. Kodwa njengamanje, sigxile ekufakeni lokhu ezandleni zalabo abakudinga kakhulu.
founders.paragraph3: Ngokuhambisana nesayensi yezokwelapha yakamuva, senze kwaba nokwenzeka ukusebenzelana nabantu be-AI abagqugquzelwe amasiko okwelapha avela emhlabeni wonke—okuhlanganisa nezinhlelo zaseMpumalanga nezase-Afrika ezivame ukunganakwa. Asiphromothi noma iyiphi indlela eyodwa. Kunalokho, sinikeza amathuluzi avumela abantu ngabanye ukuhlola uhla lwemibono futhi bahlanganise lokho abazizwa kunenjongo kakhulu kubo.
founders.paragraph4: Siyaqonda ukuthi le ndlela izohlangabezana nokuphikiswa. Okunye kwakho kuzosebenza—ukukhathazeka ngokunemba kungokoqobo, futhi sikuthatha ngokungathi sína. Okunye ukugxekwa kuzovela ngenxa yokungakhululeki ngoshintsho. Kepha ukunakekelwa kwezempilo kuyavela, noma ngabe isikhungo siyakwamukela noma cha. Umgomo wethu uwukuqondisa lolo shintsho ngokunakekela, ngokuzithoba, nangokungafihli lutho.
founders.paragraph5: I-AI inamandla, kodwa namanje ayiphelele. Lokhu akukona nje ukuzihlangula okusemthethweni—kuyingxenye yomthwalo wethu wemfanelo wokuziphatha kuwe nempilo yomphakathi. Sicela usebenzise leli thuluzi njengesithasiselo, hhayi esikhundleni, sokunakekelwa kwezokwelapha okunelayisensi.
founders.closing: Ngiyabonga ngokuba lapha. Sithemba ukuthi uzoyisebenzisa unempilo enhle.
founders.supportText: Uma ukholelwa kulokho esikwakhayo futhi ufuna ukusisiza siqhubeke, siyakudinga ukusekela kwakho. Ungakwazi ukufaka isandla ngokuchofoza isixhumanisi esingezansi.
